faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam is a reputed institute for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has a rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has been rated 3.3 on Infrastructure parameter. Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has also been rated 3.3 for Campuslife.

faqs.question: Does Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has been rated 3 on placements.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in VLSI Design, Structural Engineering, Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam is up to 336. Good thing to know is that Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Manipulative local company placements with low quality faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are happening in my college, but the companies that are coming are not reputable or famous. They are local finance companies that are not actually related to the course we are studying, and we are actually expecting more good placements. The top companies that were taking the placements I saw are comparatively top, I have seen Infopark, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is still in development. There is a new stage which is being built now after we joined, and there are a few other infrastructural changes also, but the library could be better. The hostel is okay with good building structure, water, and other services, but the mess is a total mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is good in terms of faculty and placement. Infrastructure is also good.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunities are good, but only for small companies like insurance and other small IT companies. The highest package is 5 LPA but now it's increasing, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Internships are good in college. The internships are helpful to improve students' skills and knowledge. Roles offered in software development, software testing, account, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good with internet, labs, and a library. Hostels are decent with rooms, and provide water and electricity. The food in the mess is average. The canteen is good. The canteen food is superb, and the facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am so dissatisfied with this institution.

review_content.Placements: This college has a placement cell to help students get placed in good companies with high packages. Now a days, they have so many companies coming to the college, and they give good opportunities to our students at this time. The placements are too low. But in our terms, it will become a good opportunity for new comes.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is okay but not for a professional college. Now a days they have some improvements in the infrastructure. After some days, the infrastructure will become a professional college structure. All the fans, AC, and computer are working. If there is any problem in working, a mechanic is ready to solve the problem quickly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I have an average college experience.

review_content.Placements: The college provides placement assistance. A few students got placed but most of the students who passed out got jobs on their own. The fee of the college varies, before a few years it was 4 lakhs but now it is more than 6 lakhs for engineering. A huge number of students enroll for the course of engineering each year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides decent facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and a library. The hostel facilities are average and the food is of very low quality. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. A TV and Wi-Fi are usually down or of very low speed and they cannot be used properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, which helps us to enjoy campus life.

review_content.Placements: It is a good college in Kerala. It offers courses with low fees. It is a great place to study. It provides placements for students. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tata, Honda, Infosys, Wipro, etc. About 50% of students get placed from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has great infrastructure. Classrooms are great with Wi-Fi. Labs are not air-conditioned. There is a computer lab, a machine lab, a circuit lab, a microprocessor lab, etc. Hostel food is average. It is better to eat food outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Average college where you can enjoy campus life.

review_content.Placements: Nowadays, nearly 90% of students are placed in various companies. I believe the numerbs will rise in the future. Many companies hold job fairs on campus, which helps many students find employment. We have a very good placement cell that is very active.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure. The food is average, but in comparison to other hostel menus, it is more diverse. Wi-Fi is available on the ground floor only. Water and electricity are both readily available. 5000 per month is the fee for the hostel.

reviews.review_text:
1. Actually our College is still in a basic feature or development we have a chalk board and some old benches, desks and thats it for the classrooms, the wifi is placed in each floors but not all students can connect it only few can use it at a time. 2. The overall structure of hostel is good but the rooms are so small for living because there is 4 people, other faci...

reviews.review_heading: Strictly below-average college, both in terms of infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: When I joined the college, it was very disappointing; there were not many facilities. Now they are slowly developing the building infrastructure. However, the Wi-Fi is not available for all students, not everyone can connect to and use it. The library is there, but there are very few general books. reviews.review_heading: Avarage college compare to others .
reviews.review_text: In our college infrastructure and very bad no ground and no good campus and facilites bis facilities are available but in hostel food and acomadation is very bad and no range on sim or even no Wi-Fi also in hostel food is very bad compared to other colleges .

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indira Gandhi Institute of Engineering & Technology, Kothamangalam.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average infrastructure. Our labs and facilities are well-developed. The college provides a hostel for boys and girls. The canteen is good and new. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. There are fewer sports and arts. The library is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. Don't expect much if you are planning to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Campus is so small than an average college but the essential facilities are provided within the campus like library, labs, decent classrooms, public Wi-Fi, etc. The number of students increases each year so the college is in the process of making the campus bigger. Hostel environment is 4/10. But the food is good. We have 6 days non-veg meals (veg also provided these days) and one day Kerala-style meal in a week, and the kitchen has been clean since last year.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied campus with inexperienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Actually, when we joined the college, there are not many facilities. But now, when we are studying in 3rd year, things have changed. Now there are many better facilities overall. We have a good library. There is good Wi-Fi coverage and overall infrastructure.

college_info.intro:
Sai University provides various undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes under the School of Arts and Sciences, School of Computing and Data Science, and School of Law. The courses provided by the institute include BA (Hons), BSc (Hons), BTech, BA LLB (Hons), PG Diploma in Technology, Law and Policy (Daksha Fellowship), LL.M. in Regulation and Governance, M.A. in Public Policy (Specialisation in Technology, Law and Policy), and PhD in Law.
The duration of all the courses vary from 1 year to 5 years. The fees structure includes a tuition fees ranging between INR 1.5 Lakh to INR 20 Lakh. Sai University offers these courses based on merit and valid scores of accepted entrance exams. Below are Sai University popular programmes:

placements.overview: Sai University Chennai placement for SaiU School of Law has recorded the highest package of INR 15 LPA. The SaiU School of Law has immense as the esteemed faculty and visiting professors are representatives of a variety of fields and sectors in law firms around the world. Some of the top recruiters of SaiU School of Law are AZB & Partners, S&R Associates Advocates, L&L Partners, eGov Foundation, BTG Legal, and many other leading companies participated in the recent placements of BA LLB and LLM.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty but currently do not know about placements.

review_content.Placements: I don't know much about placements. My seniors got placed by themselves. But there are opportunities, and by the time we pass out, there will be more. Top recruiters are Cognizant, Zoho, Byjus, etc. All my seniors got placed. There are also internships. Faculty help at placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food is good, and the hostel is good with no issues. NCC is available, and the food facility is great. The campus is small but sufficient for the strength present here. Medical facilities are good with no problems in the hostel or campus. There are library and gym facilities. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc (Hons.) in Biological Sciences - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with global approach for studies.

review_content.Placements: Our college has recently started so there are no placements but students get international exposure. Students can get great placements after graduation with internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on campus. All the labs are available like Biology IT, etc. It has a library that is under construction. I stay in a 3 BHK villa near a beach. There are very good cafes nearby. Sports facilities are available at the villa with a common dining space and me-time zone.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are sincere and helpful. They provide world-class facilities with very good professors. Students have to do regular internships in different companies. It is an interdisciplinary college that makes students multiplayer.

admission_process.title: Sai University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Sai University admission processhas application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and submission of a Personal Statement steps. Below are the details of the same:-

For online application, candidates need to submit the basic registration details. Candidates can fill out the Sai University application form 2025 from the official website by paying anapplication fee of INR 500.

After completing the application, candidates need to appear for the university-level entrance exam. Candidates who have appeared for the national or state-level entrance exam for the respective course are exempted from theSai University CAT.

This round is conducted to understand the candidate's aspirations and evaluation based on a Personal Statement submitted by the candidate. This round will be done through a Zoom call. Also, various factors provided in the application are evaluated in this round. After this, the admission panel finalizes the candidate's admission based on their score in the entrance exams & performance in the qualifying exams.

Sai University's selection process includes examining candidates based on their aspirations and experiences. The admission panel will also evaluate the candidates based on their academic and extracurricular accomplishments during the selection process for admission and scholarship eligibility.
Candidates shortlisted will receive an admission confirmation. After that, they will have to submit the prescribed registration fee for the respective course.

Sai University is launchingSAIUCAT(Sai University Common Admission Test), an online entrance exam for our undergraduate and postgraduate admissions. The test lasts for 60 minutes (with AI proctoring) and evaluates students on the following topics:

A detailed syllabus and sample Q&A are soon to be released. After submitting the application form, students will receive the test link via email or in the student dashboard. Candidates who have already taken SAT/ACT exams or other national and state-level entrance tests may choose to opt out of the SAIU CAT.Note:While taking these tests is optional, submitting these scores will present the complete profile of the student.

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 502 students were admitted at Bengal College of Engineering and Technology and 484 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 484 students 398 were placed with median salary of INR 380000 and 36 students opted for higher studies. A total of 359 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Bengal College of Engineering and Technologyand 391 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 391 students 349 were placed with median salary of INR 360000 and 23 students opted for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bengal College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Bengal College of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Bengal College of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,21,550 to 5,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Bengal College of Engineering and Technology is around INR 221550 - INR 370300.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Bengal College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Bengal College of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Bengal College of Engineering and Technology are Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Biotechnology Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do Bengal College of Engineering and Technology offer in their courses?

reviews_list.review_title: The honest answers campus life.

review_content.Placements: Our college has 100 % placement. The lowest package is 4 LPA, the median is 6 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA, but all this data is on campus placements. Many of my seniors did really well in off-campus, likely 20 to 25 LPA, and one also got into ISRO. The top recruiting companies of our college are TCS, Cognizant, Amazon, etc. Almost 70 to 80 % of students got internship offers in the 3rd year of the course. Software engineer, software development, data analytics, etc., are some of the top roles offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are good at my college. The full campus is covered by Wi-Fi, and we have fully air-conditioned facilities. We have computer labs, separate labs for other subjects like Physics, Chemistry, digital & analog, etc. Hostels for boys and girls have a cafeteria on our campus and a grocery shop for essential needs. We have a basketball court as well as ground for different sports like football, volleyball, and cricket. We have SKS Medical College and Vivekananda Hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Real face of BCET Durgapur.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed but not in tech field. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and average package is 4 LPA. Recruiting companies are Teachnook and Corizo. 0% as there are no big companies for internships. Something eduskill company is only there to give an internship, and no one has done it.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. We never saw labs. We have green board classrooms with least amount of space and benches. Library is only for issuing books only. Quality of food is like getting atleast 1 insect in every 10 students. Medical room is there but there is never a doctor or nurse as it is a store room. Playground is full of huge grass like about 4 feet, but some way of playing sports or online game is there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement scope for students if they have skills. Faculty members could have been better.

review_content.Placements: Talking particularly about my batch which is ECE of 2021-2025 we got a lot of placement offers from many organizations. They have a salary range of 3 LPA-9 LPA. Every student got placed in different companies according to their overall GPA and skills in top companies like TCS, Cognizant, Bitchem, MghInfra, Intellipath, Edutantr, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good only as per the rating of the college. They have a particular lab for almost all departments where 75%-80% of the equipment is working. Hostel is average as expected not so Hi-Fi but decent. The cleaning staff is there but not consistent and hostel mess food I would rate 2.5/5.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is a review for Bengal College of Engineering and Technology College.

content.Placements: This college is very good. It provides very good faculty members and very good study. Teachers here in this college are very good and they know how to make you understand the topic and everything, and the placement situation is also good. This is a good college.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the hostel, faculty members, and classes is also nice and good. The college infrastructure is neat and tidy.
content.Faculty: The way this college takes exams is very good. The security, the seating arrangement, the attendance-taking procedure, and the copy procedure everything is very good about this college. I have nothing, no complaints with this. It is very good. The teachers that used to teach in these classes are well-prepared and know how to teach and what to teach. They are very good at what they do.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements, good campus life, and a strong CSE environment.

content.Placements: BCET CSE offers 75-85% placements. Packages range from 3-6 LPA on average, with the highest 12-24 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, TechM, and Capgemini. Around 60-75% get internships in IT firms/startups. Roles offered: SDE, developer, analyst, QA, support.
content.Infrastructure: BCET CSE has good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, updated labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent, food is average, and the canteen is better. Medical help is available 24/7. Sports facilities include ground, indoor games, and events, making campus life manageable and active.

cut_off.college_name: Bengal College of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check JEE Main Round Wise Ranks

description: Bengal College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to multiple courses. Refer to the sections below to view the Bengal College of Engineering and Technology WBJEE cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds and categories, etc. Other exam-related updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Bengal College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via WBJEE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 321802 and 1120302 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 321802, B.Tech. in Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 321802.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

reviews.review_heading: This is a review for Bengal College of Engineering and Technology College.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel, faculty members, and classes is also nice and good. The college infrastructure is neat and tidy.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, good campus life, and a strong CSE environment.
reviews.review_text: BCET CSE has good Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, updated labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are decent, food is average, and the canteen is better. Medical help is available 24/7. Sports facilities include ground, indoor games, and events, making campus life manageable and active.

reviews.review_heading: The honest answers campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good at my college. The full campus is covered by Wi-Fi, and we have fully air-conditioned facilities. We have computer labs, separate labs for other subjects like Physics, Chemistry, digital & analog, etc. Hostels for boys and girls have a cafeteria on our campus and a grocery shop for essential needs. We have a basketball court as well as ground for different sports like football, volleyball, and cricket. We have SKS Medical College and Vivekananda Hospita...

reviews.review_heading: Real face of BCET Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. We never saw labs. We have green board classrooms with least amount of space and benches. Library is only for issuing books only. Quality of food is like getting atleast 1 insect in every 10 students. Medical room is there but there is never a doctor or nurse as it is a store room. Playground is full of huge grass like about 4 feet, but some way of playing sports or online game is there.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement scope for students if they have skills. Faculty members could have been better.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good only as per the rating of the college. They have a particular lab for almost all departments where 75%-80% of the equipment is working. Hostel is average as expected not so Hi-Fi but decent. The cleaning staff is there but not consistent and hostel mess food I would rate 2.5/5.

reviews.review_heading: A good place away from home to learn, build connections, and explore career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There was a separate girl's hostel with proper security, Wi-Fi, laundry, food, and medical facilities. All the facilities were good. Mess was always accessible. The food was healthy and medical had 24X7 emergency facility as well. Sports and games were all open until 8:00 PM on the campus with security.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty of the college is the best.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities of the college are very good, and the infrastructure available for the course/department, like Wi-Fi, class, sports, medical facilities, and library, are very good. Also, the hostel facilities are the best, and food quality is too good.

reviews.review_heading: Feedback and review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, and the course is very helpful. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also good. The mess facilities are also good. Medical facilities are also good. Sports and games are available. Wi-Fi, labs, and campus-wide Wi-Fi are also available.

reviews.review_heading: If your skills are good, you can easily get jobs in the IT sector.
reviews.review_text: Bengal College of Engineering and Technology is very good. The labs are very good, and our faculty members are very experienced and helpful. BCET classrooms are good, and our college library is a very peaceful place. Our playground is the best.

reviews.review_heading: BCET as the finest college in Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: I only have a complaint about the seminar hall. It needs a vast upgrade; the projectors are old, and the sound systems are old. But the other infrastructures are okay; they are all well and nicely organized. I haven't opted for the hostel, so I can't explain that.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but worst faculties. Placement and internship opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The only thing that my college has is its infrastructure. Our college has one of the biggest campuses in our city, Durgapur. The labs are very good. We have Windows 11 on almost every computer in our lab. Our college has a pretty big library, but nowadays, the Wi-Fi system is the worst. There is a pretty big playground at our college. Also, the hostels are very good, but the hostel food is a little bit oily. Nowadays, we have smart classrooms in our college. Because of a Durga temple, our hostel...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bengal College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good. Veg and non-veg both are provided by the hostel. Most of the students are from Bihar rather than Bengal and some of the students are from Jharkhand. The hostel campus is a good and peaceful place. The warden is helping by nature and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of my college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and services infrastructure available in my college are quite good. There is a separate section of books and reading in the library. Wi-Fi facilities are available for the students. Training and placement guides us for the future and company placements.

reviews.review_heading: Bcet Review by Bijoy Adhikary
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is impressive. All blocks are separate from each other: CST, Core, CE, and me. So it looks neat and clean. Also, the college library is located on the college campus, and there are so many engineering books and competitive exam books. And in the college lab, the computers are good, but some labs’ computers are very old, so this is a negative point. But all labs have AC, but the college campus does not have Wi-Fi for students.

reviews.review_heading: College with lower fees. Completely worth it.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi and internet connections and also hostel has an internet connection for the pre-final year and final year students. There is a central library other than the departmental library. The hostel has a twin seater room with individual cupboards a study table and chairs for both occupants and also the mess food is okay.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bengal College of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Byju's, Tech Mahindra, IBM and Capgemini visit our college for placements.
A good amount of students got internships from our course in different companies.

faqs.answer: SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed in 2nd PUC / 12th Std / Equivalent Exam with English as one of the Languages and obtained in aggregate in Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry / Bio-Technology / Biology / Electronics / Computer with the mentioned marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University.MCACandidate must have passed any recognised BCA / Bachelor degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent degree and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates) taken together in all the subjects in all the years of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university. OR Candidate must have passed B.Sc. / B.Com / B.A. with Mathematics at 10 + 2 level or at Graduation level (with additional bridge courses as per the norms of the concerned University) and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates) taken together in all the subjects in all the years of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates must have valid GATE score.

SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Telecommunication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Production Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a big campus with a beautiful library, etc., suggest choosing our college.

content.Placements: Placements at Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology (SSIT) in Tumkur are generally considered good, with many companies visiting the campus. And our seniors are referring that we can grab big companies with our learnt skills, that our college teaches all skills.
content.Infrastructure: According to us, paying the amount to this college is good. Facilities are very good like hostel for girls and boys, sports, especially health center, Canara Bank, etc. Hostel offers essential infrastructure and facilitates to ensure a comfortable stay for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A student's perspective: Balancing infrastructure and placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology (SSIT) reports a high placement rate for Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) students, with around 90% of students placed every year. The highest salary package offered is around 12.5 LPA, and the lowest is about 4-5 LPA. The placement percentage is 75% or more.
content.Infrastructure: The main thing is that our college has the second-largest global library in the world, and it is facilitated by the digital library. A Xerox center, canteens, cafes, library, syndicate bank, gym, IGNOU labs, a huge playground, etc., are available.

individual_reviews.title: It has a good library and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are nice. Many companies are regularly attending the campus drive and select many students. The average package is almost starts from 4 LPA and the maximum package is 18 LPA. There are also more internships for students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good library. It is famous for being the world's best library which is the shape of a globe with more than lakh books. The college has a good Wi-Fi connection for 24 hours. Classrooms are very good and good food is also available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfaction with the faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi in our college is so good, and we can easily use it. Labs are excellent, and teachers teach us very well. Our library is mesmerizing and good. Our hostel provides good facilities, and the hostel warden offers food and other facilities like coffee, medical services, sports, and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I highly recommend that you join this college. I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: SSIT is a deemed-to-be university located in Tumkur, and it comes under SSAHE University. Our college has great infrastructure, and almost 90% of students are placed every year. Companies like Microsoft, Bosch, TCS, and Tech Mahindra offer placements and internships at our college. The highest package is around 12.5 LPA and the lowest is about 4-5 LPA. They also add skill-based programs that are helpful for placements. It is ranked 29th among private engineering colleges in India.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are comfortable and have good ventilation which is helpful for students' concentration in classes. There is Wi-Fi in every department, which can be used by students, and labs are well maintained by the individual departments. Our college library is said to be Asia's second-largest library, with great interior design and infrastructure. The hostel rooms and food are also good.

OR

hostel_campus.college_name: SSIT - Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a big campus with a beautiful library, etc., suggest choosing our college.
reviews.review_text: According to us, paying the amount to this college is good. Facilities are very good like hostel for girls and boys, sports, especially health center, Canara Bank, etc. Hostel offers essential infrastructure and facilitates to ensure a comfortable stay for us.

reviews.review_heading: A student's perspective: Balancing infrastructure and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The main thing is that our college has the second-largest global library in the world, and it is facilitated by the digital library. A Xerox center, canteens, cafes, library, syndicate bank, gym, IGNOU labs, a huge playground, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good library and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good library. It is famous for being the world's best library which is the shape of a globe with more than lakh books. The college has a good Wi-Fi connection for 24 hours. Classrooms are very good and good food is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction with the faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi in our college is so good, and we can easily use it. Labs are excellent, and teachers teach us very well. Our library is mesmerizing and good. Our hostel provides good facilities, and the hostel warden offers food and other facilities like coffee, medical services, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: I highly recommend that you join this college. I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are comfortable and have good ventilation which is helpful for students' concentration in classes. There is Wi-Fi in every department, which can be used by students, and labs are well maintained by the individual departments. Our college library is said to be Asia's second-largest library, with great interior design and infrastructure. The hostel rooms and food are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, environment, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Technology (SSIT) Campus is spread over 65 acres of land with modern labs, a geodesic dome library, hostels, sports facilities, a gym, a cafeteria, and banking services. It provides a well-equipped campus for academic and extracurricular excellence.

reviews.review_heading: Better but not best. I will place this college in top 20 in Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is above average. The library is world's 2nd most beautiful library, according to the records. This college has 3 main buildings and 1 library which has wonderful environment. The hostel has 3 blocks named as something.

reviews.review_heading: Inside story of Sri Siddhartha Institute Of Technology .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is famous for it's Library infrastructure and it has a good campus as well as a greenish campus with multiple numbers of trees. Our college has 4 main park where students spend a good time with friends and it has a good canteen and cafeteria where food is also good. Our college has 2 boys hostels and 1 girls hostel. The hostel ambiance is good, and it has good food meals also.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with good placement facilities available.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well designed infrastructure  with some excellent facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, etc. Even the hostel facilities are good and they provide food in a clean and hygienic mess. Medical facilities are available in our college. Many sports and games events are conducted every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Good College with good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college's architecture is very good. There is greenery all around the college. Infrastructure-wise it is far better college. Wi-Fi is available in college campuses. The classrooms and labs are also good. The main highlight of this college is its library which is very good. Since I am not a hostelite, I can't give any comment on the hostel. The sports facilities are also good .

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are awesome for my course. In every building, Wi-Fi is available, and there are more labs for expecting the program. The library is very beautiful because it is the tops. The quality of food is also good. In every two days, boiled egg is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely beautiful and interactive.
reviews.review_text: There are more Wi-Fi access points across our college campus. The infrastructure is beautiful and sturdy. Sports events are organized semester-wise and interbranch-wise, including eSports like BGMI and Free Fire. The functions are conducted with great excitement. There is a hospital on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostels are well-maintained and secure. The hostel provides comfortable environment for students. Our college has the best library. Our college is surrounded by a community of students. Classrooms are well-equipped with computers. Labs are good. The library infrastructure is impressive. The campus is surrounded by lush greenery with minimal noise pollution. The food served in the hostel is good. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7. They provide medical...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teaching methods of our teachers.
reviews.review_text: The library is the main attraction on campus and is well-equipped with many books. The library has a calm environment for students. Classrooms are spacious with enough light and air circulation. Every building block has Wi-Fi with good speed. Separate labs are available for each department and are well-equipped with instruments and machines. Some instruments are old but usable. The hostel is not good. For 1st year students, they provide a high-tech hostel, for remaining it is old. The food serve...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with awesome infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like college buses, Wi-Fi, well-equipped laboratories, digital classrooms, and a library. Both boys' and girls' hostels are located inside the campus, and there is a health care center inside the campus. The food quality is good.

college_info.college_name: Rai University Ahmedabad: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Cutoff

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: Rai University is well-known for its popular programmes, namely BTech and MBA. BTech is provided by the Rai School of Engineering in full-time mode. The duration for the BTech course is 4 years. BTech specialisations include Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology, and Artificial Intelligence among many others. On the other hand, MBA is catered through the Rai School of Management Studies. The seat intake for the MBA course is 180. MBA at Rai University is provided in Human Resource, Marketing, Finance, and Agri Business among many others. Interested candidates can take a look below at the Rai University popular programmes:

placements.overview: Rai University admission process is based on merit scores and entrance exams. The minimum eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. All the students must also appear for the personal interview (PI) round. Scores of National and State-level entrance exams shall be considered for selection. Accepting entrance exams include JEE Main, GUJCET, CAT, MAT, and NEET among many others. Interested students must visit the official website and apply for the desired course. Check below the Rai University admission process and dates:

faqs.question: Where are Rai University alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    Rai University offers several programs at the UG, PG, and PhD. BTech is the flagship course provided at the UG level. The total tuition fees for the course is around INR 1.92 Lacs to INR 2.68 Lacs. Students must note that in the total fee charged by the Rai University, it can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Rai University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, for undergraduate courses Rai University considers class 12 result. For programmes such as BTech, BPharm, BBA, BCA, and BSc the college accepts class 12 score. Some programmes also consider merit-based selection along with a personal interview. Candidates must meet the minimum eligibility criteria specified by the university to secure admission.
faqs.question: Can I join Rai University after Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    No, entrance exam is not required for admission to BBA programme. Candidates can get a direct admission to Rai University BBA programme. The candidates only have to be eligible for the BBA programme. Further, admission process is to submit the application form with all the required documents and pay the application fee. Once the admission is confirmed, candidates have to pay the course fee to finalise their seat in the University.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission in BBA at Rai University?

faqs.answer: A:    Rai University admission to BBA programme is open. The admission procedure to BBA programme includes passing the eligibility criteria as per the University guidelines, filling the online application form and uploading all the required documents along with form. And finally submitting the form with an application fee of INR 600. And after reviewing the form candidates will be called for an personal interview. As soon as the selection rounds are over, candidates need to pay a fee of INR 2.1 Lacs - INR 4 Lacs to confirm their seat in the university. (*The fee mentioned above is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative)

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely a good college. Placements are good but you have to do your hard work.

review_content.Placements: Companies like Candid and MRF visit our campus. In the previous month, Zydus Kerka visited our campus. A lot of students got placed. The average salary package offered in my college is approximately 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The highest salary package offered is approximately 13 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are very good. You have to compromise with taste. Otherwise, the quality and hostel are good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very polite and friendly. They help you to explore many ideas if you are interested. There are different teachers for each specialisation and course. Exams are a little bit difficult. If you attend classes, you can crack exams easily. There are many courses in my college. Each course has different specialisations. There are approximately 10 specialisations in B.Tech like AIML, web development, cybersecurity, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overview of rai university.

review_content.Placements: There are campus placements. Approximately 50-70 students get placed with an average package of 4-5 LPA. Some top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Mahindra. They often come. Moreover, students also got internships in nearby colleges, and the university also offers internships to the students. These might be paid or unpaid types.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are a total of 3 buildings on the campus for academic purposes, and each class has a smartboard. Full Wi-Fi access on the campus for students. There are two hostels, each for boys and girls separately. Hostels have free Wi-Fi access, and they always take care of privacy, cleanliness, as well as hygiene. There is a CAFETERIA where all students and faculty members have their meals. In the hostel, they provide laundry and free medical facilities for all students.

course_faqs.question: What is the duration of B.Pharm at Rai University?
course_faqs.answer: The duration of the BPharma course at Rai University is four years. There are a total of eight semesters, which includes core subjects Pharmaceutical Technology, Industrial Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Phytopharmaceutical, Pharmacology, Human Anatomy Physiology, etc. Further, the BPharma course is offered under the Pharmacy Council of India [PCI], the Pharmacy Act passed by the Indian Parliament.

course_faqs.question: Is there any scholarship offered to B.Pharma students at Rai University?

course_faqs.question: IS BBA available in Rai University?
course_faqs.answer: Rai University offers Undergraduates course in BBA and BBA Hons. The BBA course covers a duration of three years and the BBA Hons four years. Specialisations offered in BBA are Information Technology & Management, Applied HR, Sales & Digital Marketing, Finance. The admission shall be made on merit on the basis of criteria notified by the University, as per UGC guidelines laid by the Government.

course_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Rai University for BBA?
course_faqs.answer: Rai University is a private University established in Ahmedabad under the Act No. 12 of 2012, Government of Gujarat. The University is recognised by UGC and also a memeber of AIU. In the case of placement, it has good track record of 100% with top recruiting companies such as Wipro, HCL Technologies, TATA Motors, etc. Rai University's BBA course offers a salary package of INR 3.6 Lacs - 4.6 Lacs with 100% assured placement and a montly stipend of INR 10k.

course_faqs.question: What is the application fee for D.Pharma at Rai University?

course_faqs.question: What is the scope of D.Pharma course from Rai University?
course_faqs.answer: After pursuing DPharma course from Rai University, candidates can either choose to pursue BPharma by taking admission through lateral entry. For this, the candidates have to appear in top entrance examinations. They can also work in popular pharmaceutical companies that deal with research, development, preparation and trials of various kinds of drugs. D Pharma professionals can also choose to pursue higher education and enter the field of academics. Therefore, there is no dearth of opportunities

review_summary.college_name: Rai University Ahmedabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus and environment of the college are so good. Teachers are friendly, which helps a lot.

content.Placements: Great placements are there in the college. Last year's students got approximately 9 LPA, which makes me more excited about my studies. The more I study, the greater the rate of placement in my college, and very good companies are coming to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is super good, and the mess food is also awesome. As I chose the B.Tech course, it was my right choice. The hostel environment is also very good. No ragging or problems occur there, and the food is very healthy. Course studies are also very good according to the field.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good. It is a great college, and you can join it.

content.Placements: Almost 50–60% of students get placed. The highest package offered by the university is 5.8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are Zydus and Media Script. Almost 80% of students get internships in companies like Zydus Cadila. Various workshops and programs related to pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available on campus. Wi-Fi is available 24/7, labs are good, and practicals are also performed. Classes are clean and well-maintained. A library is available for students with all the necessary books related to pharmacy. The hostel is good, and the food quality is also good. Medical facilities are available at all times, whether day or night. Indoor and outdoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a good college. Placements are good but you have to do your hard work.

content.Placements: Companies like Candid and MRF visit our campus. In the previous month, Zydus Kerka visited our campus. A lot of students got placed. The average salary package offered in my college is approximately 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The highest salary package offered is approximately 13 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are very good. You have to compromise with taste. Otherwise, the quality and hostel are good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very polite and friendly. They help you to explore many ideas if you are interested. There are different teachers for each specialisation and course. Exams are a little bit difficult. If you attend classes, you can crack exams easily. There are many courses in my college. Each course has different specialisations. There are approximately 10 specialisations in B.Tech like AIML, web development, cybersecurity, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overview of rai university.

content.Placements: There are campus placements. Approximately 50-70 students get placed with an average package of 4-5 LPA. Some top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Mahindra. They often come. Moreover, students also got internships in nearby colleges, and the university also offers internships to the students. These might be paid or unpaid types.
content.Infrastructure: There are a total of 3 buildings on the campus for academic purposes, and each class has a smartboard. Full Wi-Fi access on the campus for students. There are two hostels, each for boys and girls separately. Hostels have free Wi-Fi access, and they always take care of privacy, cleanliness, as well as hygiene. There is a CAFETERIA where all students and faculty members have their meals. In the hostel, they provide laundry and free medical facilities for all students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: In the middle-range college, this college is good, and its environment is also too good.

content.Placements: At Rai University, the placement percentage is around 70% for those who are eligible, but companies are coming to our college for placement. The highest placement package for our college students is around 12 LPA, and the average package is around 5-7 LPA. And the lowest packages are around 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Applo, and Medicare. In our college, 60 to 80% of students get internships in web development, data science, AI, ML, and cyber security.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, the engineering department labs and workshop area are too good, especially for computer science engineering students because our college's computer labs are too updated, and new-vision hardware is used for providing a better experience. Also, our college is a Wi-Fi campus where Wi-Fi is available everywhere on the college campus. Classrooms are good. The library is average, where multiple books are available. You can choose any one which you like and grab knowledge. Hostel facilities in our college are too good, where they take care of our privacy and hygiene, and mess quality is also good.

data.description: In Rai University there is a hostel in it. In college hostel, they provide personal washroom. The rooms in the hostel are 4 seater, 3 seater, 2 seater and 1 seater with different prices. They also have air conditioned rooms. The AC rooms are more costlier than normal room. In hostel mess, there are 3 meal and in evening you can have tea in mess. The mess food is quite okay. If you don't like the food of mess you can order tiffin from out side. There are more many PGS near by Rai University but they all are in nearby village, in Saroda and Dholka and many more villages. They all are more than 2 to 3 km away from university. There are some hotels for food and also tiffin service, but the hotel takes delivery charge. The tiffin service does free delivery.

paragraphs: Rai University admission to BBA programme is open. The admission procedure to BBA programme includes passing the eligibility criteria as per the University guidelines, filling the online application form and uploading all the required documents along with form. And finally submitting the form with an application fee of INR 600. And after reviewing the form candidates will be called for an personal interview. As soon as the selection rounds are over, candidates need to pay a fee of INR 2.1 Lacs - INR 4 Lacs to confirm their seat in the university.
(*The fee mentioned above is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative)

Rai University's BBA and BBA Hons  programme covers a  duration of three and four years respectively. Admissionn procedure includes filling the application form online and uploading all the required documents along with the application form. Finally submitting the application form with attested testimonials and application fees of INR 600 either online or offine.

The application fee for DPharma course at Rai University is around INR 600. Candidates must make the fee payment once the application forms is submitted. The DPharma fee is around INR 2.6 Lacs for two years. The fees might include components other than tuition fees. The mentioned fee is as per Fee Regulatory Committee (Technical), Gujarat. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A balanced insight into student experience, facilities, and career opportunities.

content.Placements: Placement was good for CS and IS, IT, and BT branches. Almost 15 students got selected. Top recruiting companies were Infosys, IBM, Wipro, and Cognizant. All students got internships because it's compulsory in our college. Students opted for internships according to their choice.
content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure and it's very old building. You just love the environment of college. Our college had very good libraries. Free Wi-Fi system was available. Classrooms were very big and had bright lights and good air facilities. Hostel food was good. College had canteen with good service and a coffee day. College provided good medical facilities. Our college had a very big ground and it participated in many state-level competitions in cricket and volleyball.

description: Basaveshwar Engineering College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Basaveshwar Engineering College Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 21779 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Basaveshwar Engineering College. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 21779 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 28778, while in 2023, it was 22216.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Basaveshwar Engineering College accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning has the lowest cutoff rank of 33429 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 36480, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Basaveshwar Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning stood at 74077 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 93452. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Basaveshwar Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Average Salary Package: The average salary for a B.Tech graduate is around INR 4,00,000 per yea

reviews.review_heading: A balanced insight into student experience, facilities, and career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure and it's very old building. You just love the environment of college. Our college had very good libraries. Free Wi-Fi system was available. Classrooms were very big and had bright lights and good air facilities. Hostel food was good. College had canteen with good service and a coffee day. College provided good medical facilities. Our college had a very big ground and it participated in many state-level competitions in cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members. It has good placements in 2025 and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It is good for students in hostels compared with other hostel facilities. It offers a wide range of academic and professional courses. College life helps in personal growth through new experiences and friendships. I have a nice experience at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and has good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs available on our campus. There is one library and classrooms are pretty good. Engineering life is the best life. I am not a hosteller but the hostel is pretty good. Mess is also well and there is a canteen on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Why it is the best college, and why select this college?
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good because it is built in vast area of 95 acres of land with seperate buildings for every department. The college provides Wi-Fi on campus. Labs and classrooms are very well-maintained. The college has a good library and reading room. Facilities in the hostel are good with the delicious food.

reviews.review_heading: History of my college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was very good and I got very good friends in the hostel. But the food provided in the hostel was average. The tiffin was good, but the dinner and lunch were average.

reviews.review_heading: I breathed in every moment of my college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of department was good compared to other colleges but the management department was not good at all. They used to judge students by fees. Coming to hostel, hostel was good but the food was not okay, same taste very week but tiffin was nice. Lunch and dinner were average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college to join in.
reviews.review_text: Basveshwar Engineering College has one of the best infrastructures and a very good hostel with a great verities of food every day. There are two hostels to accommodate and a girl's hostel with more than 100 seats. All the rooms in the hostel are provided with fans and furniture with good maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for enjoying not for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good with a vast area of 100 acres of land. The college has a good environment to enjoy the engineering life. The hostel is constructed with good food. Every room is hygienic. The hostel provides all facilities that students need.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy to study in this college. If anyone gets a chance, please take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Our college started in 1962. From that day up to now, this college has made new performances every year. We have a total of 10 branches now with highly qualified teachers and staff. We have well-infrastructured facilities with 24*7 Wi-Fi and so on. When we come to the hostel, it is the best hostel in the Bagalkot district .

reviews.review_heading: Very nice placements with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The total campus is about 94 acres, and each department has separate buildings with Wi-Fi facilities for students to use on campus and good laboratories as well. Hostels are very well maintained with good food; every Friday evening, there are evening snacks.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for students’ career building.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and the facilities are better here. There is a huge library with collections of many books related to the courses. There is a separate newspaper reading and magazine reading hall along with a huge separate space for studying. Classroom facilities are all good with smart boards and latest technologies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Basaveshwar Engineering College, Bagalkot.
reviews.review_text: The library is good and it has some out-of-date books. It contains a small  number of technical books. The college has both indoor and outdoor playgrounds. Our college achieved well in sports. The semester exams are a little bit difficult.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of Basaveshwar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. My department is also near the college entrance. Wi-Fi is available in the college, as are department labs, which are well maintained by faculty members. The hostel is very good; there are three rooms shared. In hostels, food is also good, and the mess is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: All about my college BEC, this is a very short review of my college .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Courses and hostels are good. The library is also well-maintained. Labs have required materials for practicals. Practical exams are also very easy. Teachers will guide about the experiments. After all experiments, they will conduct sample lab exams which are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: The overall experience of the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is good throughout the college. Classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards and projectors. The labs have all the necessary working equipment, and the hostel is affordable and good. The food is good, and the hostel staff is very supportive.

faqs.answer:
A:    Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centre has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.
M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

paragraphs: Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centre admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 16 programmes.Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centreoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centre for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centre has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechSponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government D

hostel_campus.college_name: Matoshri College of Engineering and Research Centre Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very slow, which is not of any use because it doesn't help you to use the internet at all. The food is not that good, and even when they make something special, it's not good. It is better not to stay in the college hostel. You should stay somewhere else.

reviews.review_heading: Strict college campus, teachers are good but there's no on-campus hiring process.
reviews.review_text: Canteen is not worth for money, very much basic snacks are there, no taste at all. Labs of departments are average, some of PCs do not have practical configurations. Library is average as well. Wi-Fi quality is below and average not usable and working at all.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied. Good teachers, placements, infrastructure, and facility.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is available. We have libraries for studies. Labs are there for the student. The best faculty members are there. The food quality of college hostel is good, better than that outside. They are providing no start launch and dinner, it is a good quality.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good, but I am not satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but there is a network issue also, labs and classrooms are neat and clean. The library is also well-maintained. The canteen's food is not so good, but medical facilities are available which are needed for any college, we can play games as per our choice if we want then we can play indoor games also.

reviews.review_heading: The information About An MCOERC
reviews.review_text: All over classrooms are good in college. The projectors are available in all classrooms. The staffs are also using both digital and black board to teach and it's very helpful to students and staff also. It makes the teaching learning process much more easy.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2023 and 2024 also.
reviews.review_text: My college has many computer labs, and each department has its own library. In the library, there are Wi-Fi facilities for students and teachers. Each department has sufficient classes. The hostel is neat and clean every day. The quality of hostel mess food is too good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely nice placements, really good staff, and very nice teaching.
reviews.review_text: In Matoshri college of engineering, there is a very nice, comfortable Wi-Fi facility. The food quality is good, and the mess and canteen are clean. The sports facilities are very nice, and there is importance given to sports opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: A honest review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. All the classes are well-equipped with projectors, smart board and internet facilities. Also the labs are well-equipped. The mess food is not that good but the hostel rooms and the accommodation facilities are good. Overall infra is good.

reviews.review_heading: Think before choosing to take admission in any college; it is a question of your life.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities provided by the college and staff; nice infrastructure; there are no clubs in our college; no sports and games happen here; the college campus is the worst; all students hate this for not having a good campus; and canteen food is not that good to like.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college building had 4 floors. Every floor was provided for a separate branch and had 5 labs. There were two hostels for boys and girls. Our college had a separate playground for all the games near the hostels. There were separate canteens for boys and girls. Good security guards were provided for good privacy. Library and a special room were available to study. Our campus was good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college but if you are getting any better option go for it.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. The infrastructure of our college is decent. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs are properly maintained. All the equipment is working very well. All students can use the library. It has all course-related books. The mess is not good. It does not provide good food. Medical facilities are good. We can play sports in our college like cricket, badminton, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary facilities are available in our college. Classrooms are well-equipped. The library and a study room are available in our college. Classrooms have projector screens and Wi-Fi. They are quite spacious. The food served in the hostel is good and hygienic. The living space is good. The practical lab is well-quipped and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is improving every day. Wi-Fi facility is not good. Laboratory facility is good. Our classrooms are clean. Smart boards are available for teaching. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities. But I have heard from friends that the hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with nice infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and good labs are available. Classrooms are good and digital blackboards are there in them. Library is the best with good books. A digital library is also available. Hostel is good and its food quality is also good. A sports ground is available and amphitheater is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good campus, atmosphere, and is the best place to enjoy your studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of a college plays a vital role in the development of the college as students are now focusing on labs, classrooms, etc., while selecting a college. It is important that the colleges have very good infrastructure with advanced laboratories equipped with state-of-the-art equipment, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The summary of the review is that the college is absolutely good. It is government-funded college.

review_content.Placements: Mainly about 40% of the students get placed in my course. Students whose academics are good get the main recruitment companies. The average package offered is 3 LPA. Most of the package is also very good in this regard and we have good internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided. The labs are good and classrooms are normal. College library is also big which we call it center library. Many facilities are provided by the college. But some facilities are very minimum. The infrastructure of the college is good but it is too old.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty members and college but not with the placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not good. 5-6 students got their placements with an average package of 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Few of them got salary of 6 LPA - 7 LPA from TCS, Reliance, and some other software companies. College did not help with placements and internships. Students did their internships with the help of their own connections.
review_content.Infrastructure: Electrical engineering branch had few labs which were not in good condition. Classrooms and professors were satisfying. There was no canteen. Medical facilities were also not available at this college. There were various sports clubs and tech clubs. Computer lab was not frequently used.
