review_summary.college_name: Rewa Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty and the course.

content.Placements: Rewa Engineering College (REC) in Rewa, Madhya Pradesh, has a dedicated placement cell and career development centre that works to help students find placements. While the college has seen placements in companies like IndiaMART, Capgemini, Infosys, and TCS, the placement rate and salary packages vary by department and year. Some sources suggest an average package between 3.5 LPA and 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. A new building is being designed this year. Rewa Engineering College also started to provide M.Tech, for which a new building was constructed. They have 4 playgrounds for playing sports like football, cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, etc. They have good labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is the best in central India, featuring numerous expert faculty members and departments.

content.Placements: Almost all the students got placed in my branch. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5.5 LPA. L&T, Ultratech Cement, and HMBS are the top recruiting companies. Nearly all students secure internships with reputable companies like NTPC.
content.Infrastructure: My college is set on 250 acres. It features a large campus with numerous facilities. Every classroom has a skateboard and a big library. All branches have their dedicated labs. There are two boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. The college mess maintains hygienic conditions.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The summary of the review is that the college is absolutely good. It is government-funded college.

content.Placements: Mainly about 40% of the students get placed in my course. Students whose academics are good get the main recruitment companies. The average package offered is 3 LPA. Most of the package is also very good in this regard and we have good internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided. The labs are good and classrooms are normal. College library is also big which we call it center library. Many facilities are provided by the college. But some facilities are very minimum. The infrastructure of the college is good but it is too old.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty members and college but not with the placements.

content.Placements: Placements were not good. 5-6 students got their placements with an average package of 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Few of them got salary of 6 LPA - 7 LPA from TCS, Reliance, and some other software companies. College did not help with placements and internships. Students did their internships with the help of their own connections.
content.Infrastructure: Electrical engineering branch had few labs which were not in good condition. Classrooms and professors were satisfying. There was no canteen. Medical facilities were also not available at this college. There were various sports clubs and tech clubs. Computer lab was not frequently used.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Rewa Engineering College review.

content.Placements: According to my seniors, approximately 30 percent of the students were placed last year. The highest package was 15 LPA, the lowest was 1.5 LPA, and the average package was 4.5 LPA. Some students got off-campus placements because they had good skills, so they were able to get better packages. However, the college does not include these students in their placement percentages.
content.Infrastructure: The college has four playgrounds, two hostels, one for boys and one for girls, a library with over 10,000 books, and a vast campus of about 120 acres. The facilities are quite good in the hostel.

Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in JEE Main, MP BE, and MPPET. Students can choose from 5 specialisations such as Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering and Computer Science Engineering among others. To complete the Rewa Engineering College admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 1,49,400 - 1,99,200.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

cut_off.college_name: Rewa Engineering College Cutoff 2025: Check JEE Main Round Wise Ranks

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: Rewa Engineering College cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Rewa Engineering College JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Rewa Engineering College cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 130153 and 308620 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 130153, B.E. in Computer Science Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 128815.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 130153.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Considering the Rewa Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General AI category students were B.E. in Computer Science Engineering, B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.E. in Electrical Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 130153, 205385, and 286843, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rewa Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and the course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. A new building is being designed this year. Rewa Engineering College also started to provide M.Tech, for which a new building was constructed. They have 4 playgrounds for playing sports like football, cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, etc. They have good labs.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in central India, featuring numerous expert faculty members and departments.
reviews.review_text: My college is set on 250 acres. It features a large campus with numerous facilities. Every classroom has a skateboard and a big library. All branches have their dedicated labs. There are two boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. The college mess maintains hygienic conditions.

reviews.review_heading: The summary of the review is that the college is absolutely good. It is government-funded college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided. The labs are good and classrooms are normal. College library is also big which we call it center library. Many facilities are provided by the college. But some facilities are very minimum. The infrastructure of the college is good but it is too old.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members and college but not with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Electrical engineering branch had few labs which were not in good condition. Classrooms and professors were satisfying. There was no canteen. Medical facilities were also not available at this college. There were various sports clubs and tech clubs. Computer lab was not frequently used.

reviews.review_heading: Rewa Engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: The college has four playgrounds, two hostels, one for boys and one for girls, a library with over 10,000 books, and a vast campus of about 120 acres. The facilities are quite good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate of this college is growing, and the faculty are very sincere with their job.
reviews.review_text:
As our college was started in 1964. It is one of the oldest college of Madhya Pradesh; that's why many parts of the building gets damaged, and many new building are being built. A new CSE building work is also in progress; there are two libraries and many smart classrooms with projectors
.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members!
reviews.review_text: All the respective departments have their well-managed labs and classes. The labs and workshops have magnificent machines. In comparison to colleges like Government College Sagar and other colleges like Nowgaon, etc., Rewa Engineering College has a collection of machines, 3D printers, and so on that private colleges could not afford.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college is the best for value college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not in proper working condition; the classroom has no working fans, light or computers. In the hostel, 3-time mess food is of good quality, and there is properly working Wi-Fi with 30 Mbps high-speed data. Football, volleyball and cricket are outdoor games, and chess, carrom, and table tennis are indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Rewa Engineering College has been a great institute.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also not up to the mark, but courses are good, and hostels are provided separately for boys and girls. However, the girls hostel is outside the college campus. However, the environment of the college is good. Labs are good and the library has books we need and is very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in the college. There are free Wi-Fi available in whole college building. There are many Workshop and labs with different type of instrument and machines. There are two library first is Central library which is for GEN and OBC students and second is SC/ST library which is for SC and ST students. There are two boys hostel and one girls hostel, in girls hostel mess facility is available but in boys hostel mess facility is not available. There are one dispensary ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rewa Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is good. Girls' hostel is the best with a mess facility that serves food at a moderate price but the mess facility is not available in the boys' hostel. Students can prefer a private tiffin center outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are so good because they have the best equipment and machines from 1947, the majority of which are not available in IITs. Classrooms have a very good atmosphere because the college is not in the main city. It is 2 kilometers from the city. The library has a very good system where every student can borrow books and read for the whole semester. Hostels are close to the college and provide adequate security and amenities. We also have a mess and canteen in our hostel. The college also provides...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is just 500 meters away from our campus. There is a well-equipped laboratory. E-library is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good value for money is better than private institutes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. All branches have their departments as per requirement. Our college has 3 grounds for playing games. The hostel is also good. In each hostel room, two students will share the room. The library is not good for general category students. A canteen is not available in our college. Laboratories are average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and it is affordable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Laboratories were also good.

Some of the most popular courses offered at CT University are BSc, BTech, BPharma, PhD, and BCA. For admission in BTech courses, the Class 12 percentage plays a vital role.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CT University courses are offered to students under various streams such as Management, Engineering, Law, Arts, Science, Humanities, etc., at UG, PG, and other levels. Every course has its eligibility criteria and their fee structure. Some of the programs offered by CTU Ludhiana are Bachelor of Commerce, Diploma in Business Administration, Bachelor of Computer Applications, Bachelor of Technology, BA, LLB (5-year integrated program), and so on.

faqs.answer: A:    CT University is not hard to get, provided the majority of courses consider 45% to 50% of aggregate in Class 12. For majority of PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. Apart from this, candidates must obtain a valid score in CTSET which is the University conducted exam for majority of courses provided by it.
faqs.question: Is CT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    CT University has specified the eligibility requirements that an MBA aspirants must satisfy to be eligible to take admission at the university. Candidates who have scored at least 50%  in a bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university/institute. The minimum aggregate required in the case of SC candidates is 45%.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for CT University MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the Shiksha verified reviews, CT University does not have a dress code. However, during induction programs or guest lectures, students are requested to wear formals. In addition to this, CTU students are expected to dress according to the occasion whether it be a sports day, orientation day etc.
faqs.question: Is there any dress code at CTU?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for the BTech programme at CT University the candiates need to have a minimum of 50% in their class 12 from a recognised board, with any of the following combinations: Non-Medical, Commerce, or Arts. BTech is also offered as a three-year lateral entry programme and the candidates need to take LEET exam for admission to the lateral entry programme at CT University.

reviews_list.review_title: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.

review_content.Placements: In the BCA IBM course, we have 2 sections for 2 years which have more than 250 students. The package of BCA starts from 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered till now ranges from 5-7 LPA and that is too difficult. Because no student wants to sit in the placement of CT University. The reason for this is that they have very useless companies to provide placements. CT University BCA students have seen placements with companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Byju's. Approximately 40% of students will go for internships which is decided by the university authorities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from CT University, Ludhiana Batch 2026, and the course is ongoing. Around 70–75% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, the lowest is 12 LPA, and the average is 16 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Alpha IT, Cisco, etc. Around 60–65% of students get internships at companies like Novem Control, TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Technical Support Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA available at CT University?
course_faqs.answer: CT University offers an MBA under 11 specialisations including Supply Chain and Logistics, Entrepreneurship, Hospitality & Tourism, Marketing, Entrepreneurship are more. To be eligible for the programme the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 50% in graduation. The total tuition fee for MBA programme as per unofficial sources ranges between INR 3.4 Lacs - INR 3.8 lakh.

overview_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BTech lateral entry programme?
overview_faqs.answer: BTech lateral entry is offered under three specialisations at CT University. The specialisations offered are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Chemical Engineering. To be eligible for the BTech programme at CT University the aspiring candidates need to take LEET exam. The total tuition fee for the BTech lateral entrey programme provided bt CT University is INR 5.1 lakh. The fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is CT University good for MTech?
overview_faqs.answer: The overall engineerijng package for placement 2023 was INR 44 LPA. The total tuition for the two-year M.Tech programme at CT University is INR 1.52 lakh. Considering the total cost of tuition and the package secured this seems to be a good return on the investment. The package mentioned is the overall package of Engineering and is not specific to M.Tech prograame. The total tuition fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence is, indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is CT University good for BBA programme?
overview_faqs.answer: CT University offers a three year BBA programme which has a total tuition fee of INR 3 Lacs - INR 3.6 lakh. The highest UG course package secured in placements 2023 after the completion of the course was INR 44 LPA. Considering the total tuition fee and the package secured after the completion of the course this seems to be a good return on the investment. The fee mentioned here is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. The package mentioned here is the overall UG package and is not specific to the BBA programme.

review_summary.college_name: CT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Nice college and everything.

content.Placements: I did B.Sc. fashion design course, and passed it in 2025. My experience is too great. The highest package is 5 LPA- 6 LPA. The percentage of students got internships from this course is 70% to 75%. Every course has its specialty, then if you are interested in any of them, so you can take admission and listen to your heart.
content.Infrastructure: They provide the facility of Wi-Fi and the Wi-Fi speed is too great The quality of the food is very great every week. The main course is filled with protein and vitamins, all we need. They didn't force us to focus on study, only they also said to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: CT University is in the heart of our city.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placements in the reputable industry. The highest package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Students get internships in companies. They do everything for the betterment of students. They organised internships in companies like Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is very luxurious. The food of the canteen is very hygienic and a good quality. The food in the mess is very hygienic and of good quality. There are all types of books available for the students in the library.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence with IBM - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.

content.Placements: In the BCA IBM course, we have 2 sections for 2 years which have more than 250 students. The package of BCA starts from 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered till now ranges from 5-7 LPA and that is too difficult. Because no student wants to sit in the placement of CT University. The reason for this is that they have very useless companies to provide placements. CT University BCA students have seen placements with companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Byju's. Approximately 40% of students will go for internships which is decided by the university authorities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.

content.Placements: I am pursuing B.Tech in CSE from CT University, Ludhiana Batch 2026, and the course is ongoing. Around 70–75% of students get placed. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, the lowest is 12 LPA, and the average is 16 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Alpha IT, Cisco, etc. Around 60–65% of students get internships at companies like Novem Control, TCS, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Technical Support Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, supportive environment, and steady placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Around 70–80% of students from our course get placed through campus recruitment. The highest package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5–3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Novem Tech, and Vers. About 60–70% of students get internship opportunities through college support.
content.Infrastructure: The department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both academic and practical learning. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi facility are available throughout the academic blocks. The mess food is average, with a set food menu for a week.

admission_overview.college_name: CT University Course Admissions 2025: Application Process, Eligibility Criteria, Fees

admission_process.title: CT University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CT University admission 2025to most of the UG and PG programmes is entrance-based. The University has industry and academic tie-ups with various reputed organisations and MNCs. CTU offers various UG and PG courses in streams, includingEngineering, Science, Management, Law, Medical Sciences, Commerce, and Information Technology. CT University application forms can be filled in both online and offline modes.

CT Universityprovides a range of programmes including BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, BCA, MSc, BBA and BCom.CT University course admissionis entrance-based and candidates can apply online for admission to these courses. Check out the table for highlights related to CT University admission:
Particulars
CT University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
Admission status 2023
Accepted entrance exams
How to apply?
Online at (https://ctuniversity.in/)
Offline at the University campus
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

CT University admissionis based on merit as well as entrance exam scores of candidates. Before getting admission to the courses offered at CT University. The candidates need to make sure they fulfil the eligibility criteria. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for CT University courses:

CT University feesare cumulative of multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, library deposits, caution deposits, etc. Some of the fee components are one-time paid, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Apart from this, the CT University's course-wise seat intake varies. Availability of seats is one of the determining factors for admission. The fee amount varies from course to course. Check below the year-wise CT University fees and seat intake for top courses:
NOTE:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The admission procedure at CT University includes the following steps: online/ offline application, meeting eligibility criteria, qualifying CTSET, preparation of a merit list, counseling for course selection, document verification, fee payment, and final admission. It's essential to check the university's website or contact the admission office for specific course requirements and updates. Find below the step-wise CT University admission process:
Step 1: CT University Application Process

The admission process begins with filling out an online application form on the official website of CT University or offline by visiting the campus. Apart from that, candidates need to appear for the CT SET entrance exams conducted by the university. The application for CT SET has to be filled out separately through the official website of the university.
Step 2: CT University Selection Rounds
Admission to CT University courses is both merit and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, candidates are required to qualify for the CT SET exam.
Step 3: CT University Counselling Process/ Merit Release

Based on the scores in the CT SET, past academic records and performance of candidates in other selection rounds, the college releases a merit list. Further, for direct admissions, the college conducts a counselling process based on candidates' scores obtained in the last examination.
Step 4: Provisional Admission Notice

After the selection rounds, a provisional admission notice will be sent to the selected candidates. Later on, candidates can proceed with the other admission formalities such as fee payment and document verification (if required). For more details about the final admission process, candidates may visit the official website of CT University.
For more information about CT University check out the below video:

faqs.question: Is there BTech at CT University?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech programme is offered under four specialisations at CT University. The programme is also offered as a lateral entry and to be eligible for this programm at CT University the aspiring candidates need a minimum of 50% in their class 12. The specialisation offered for the four-year BTech programme are Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Electronics and Communication Engineering.

faqs.question: What BTech specialisations are offered at CT University?
faqs.answer: CT University offers the BTech programme under four specialisations Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and Electronics and Communication Engineering. The university also offers lateral entry programmes with specialisations like Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Civil Engineering. Class 12 with a minimum of 50% is required to be eligible for these programme at CT University.

faqs.question: What is the minimum percentage required for CT University?
faqs.answer: The minimum percentage required for a candidate to enter the CT University is 50% in aggregate to enroll in any course. However, every course has its eligibility criteria and terms and conditions. For more details about the courses, a candidate can keep checking Shiksha’s website or can even check the official website, ensuring to select the language, domain-specific subjects, and general test as per the respective programs/ universities.

faqs.question: Is there any dress code at CTU?
faqs.answer: According to the Shiksha verified reviews, CT University does not have a dress code. However, during induction programs or guest lectures, students are requested to wear formals. In addition to this, CTU students are expected to dress according to the occasion whether it be a sports day, orientation day etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: CT University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Day scholars' parents must sign a local guardian affidavit if living off-campus.
You may incur a transport fee if using university buses.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and everything.
reviews.review_text: They provide the facility of Wi-Fi and the Wi-Fi speed is too great The quality of the food is very great every week. The main course is filled with protein and vitamins, all we need. They didn't force us to focus on study, only they also said to play.

reviews.review_heading: CT University is in the heart of our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very luxurious. The food of the canteen is very hygienic and a good quality. The food in the mess is very hygienic and of good quality. There are all types of books available for the students in the library.

reviews.review_heading: CT University (CTU) is a waste of money.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, facilities are very poor as compared to the fee we pay. The university charges Rs. 50,000-60,000 for the hostel but the quality of food is absolutely average. Room facilities are decent. I have also stayed in the university many times for night events and as far as I have seen, the university provides good quality food to reduce its expenses. Eating in the canteen is much better than eating in their mess.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is supportive. Good placements. Neat and clean environment.
reviews.review_text: The university provides good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, 24/7 medical support, and good sports facilities, including a gym and indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive environment, and steady placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both academic and practical learning. Classrooms are clean and have projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi facility are available throughout the academic blocks. The mess food is average, with a set food menu for a week.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facility was present on the campus. Modern computer labs, digital classrooms, and a library with a variety of books were available. The hostel was also very good, and the mess and canteen were also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It was very satisfying to study here.
reviews.review_text:
There were various facilities that were offered to the students, like 24-hour hours lab, libraries, the smart classroom, Wi-Fi on whole campus, private access to the labs and computers, etc.
The hostels were neat, clean and airy. Moreover, the food provided in the mess and canteen was very hygienic, and the preparation is done in an appropriate way. Coaches were recruited for each and every game and the playing material was provided to the students in the hostel itself.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good facilities, and I suggest you join the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over 28 acres of land. The infrastructure is good. The teaching and learning facilities are 48 classrooms and 4 computer labs. All books are available in the library. The WiFi is enabled on the whole campus. The hostel facilities are excellent. Good beds and washrooms are good. The canteen provides many popular dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and faculty available at this college.
reviews.review_text: CT University has good infrastructure for the BCA course. Computer labs are available for coding practice. The college provides Wi-Fi in the labs and library. Classrooms have proper seating and facilities. The college also offers good-quality hostel facilities. There are multiple sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is too good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is next level. The modern building looks great. There are a number of blocks, each containing classrooms and offices. All classrooms have Wi-Fi. All kinds of books are found in the library. The food quality in the canteen is also very good. There are medical facilities for students, as well as sports and games for physical fitness.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Teaching. Good Food. 100% Placement Guarantee. High Education Provided.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food is just like home. There is also a big playground for students. All the hostels are neat and clean. The food quality of the canteen is good. They conduct sports meets every year with winners' prizes. I recommend this college for you. Thank you.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and satisfied with the faculty of this college.
reviews.review_text: CT University has decent infrastructure for the BCA course. College management provides the best quality facilities to its students. The college campus has Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library, a canteen, sports facilities, a parking lot, etc., for the students. Hostel facilities are also provided to the students. Food in the hostel mess can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: CT University in Punjab (BCA).
reviews.review_text: There is a large, spacious library with a various collection of books, journals, articles, and updated newspapers. There is a large sports ground, and students are asked to play their interested sports. The food available at our college canteen is acceptable to eat.

reviews.review_heading: MBA Program from CT University.
reviews.review_text: CT University has decent infrastructure and good quality facilities. The College offers facilities like Wi-Fi, Labs, Library, Canteen, Classrooms, etc., to the students. Our College also offers hostels for the students. Food and other facilities of the College are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The university has its central library, and it has books that we want, but it does not allow outside material to be studied because it has so many sports grounds. There is a lack of laboratories, as the same labs are not in good condition. The classrooms are neat. Wi-Fi is enabled. The hostel's facilities are good.

college_info.college_name: CT University

data.description: CT University can be considered a modern university with all the basic amenities that the students could ask for. However, it is very clear that CTU aims to make a healthy environment around the campus as it focuses on both mental and physical health of the students. CTU has a very huge common room where the students can be seen playing indoor games during their class breaks and after dinner time. CTU campus also includes a cricket ground with natural grass pitches and floodlit synthetic practice pitches. Further, CTU classrooms are also made in a way to enhance the learning knowledge and to enhance the student engagement during the lectures.

college_info.college_name: CT University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: CTU Scholarships are offered to exemplary candidates in various slabs as per the percentage student score in the CT-SET to support them in every way possible. However, there are a few eligibility criteria set by the university and the government that the candidate must meet to avail of the scholarships.
All these scholarships are offered to students with a family income of $60,000 annually, some of which are listed below:

1. Scholarship based on Academic- These types of scholarships are the financial rewards given to students who have demonstrated outstanding academic achievement. They usually cover academic costs like tuition fees, books, etc.
2. Scholarship based on Financial aid- This type of scholarship is provided to students who demonstrate a strong need for financial assistance and are hard-working.
3. Scholarship based on CT-SET- CTU offers scholarships to laudable students in various slabs according to their performance in CT-SET.
4. Scholarship based on JEE- Every college has different requirements and a set of eligibility criteria. This type of scholarship is based on the performance of the student in JEE.
5. Scholarship based on Sport- This type of scholarship provides wings to athletes who are serious about making their career in the sports field.

overview_faqs.question: Can Keystone School of Engineering be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Keystone School of Engineering is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Keystone School of Engineering boasts an impressive review rating of 4.03 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.92 for Campus Life, 3.88 for Placements, 4.28 for Faculty, and 3.9 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Keystone School of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty interaction.

content.Placements: I chose this course, and around 160 students took the same course as me. I don't know the exact package, but around 5 LPA is the average package. The highest package is around 20 LPA. Talking about the lowest, it is around 2 LPA. Some of the students in the 3rd year got internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: College hostel isn't big. Quality of canteen food is too good, and budget-friendly, but the opposite college mess is average. College has placed Wi-Fi in every lab and class, but they don't allow students to use it. The library is good too, and sometimes classrooms are dirty. As I'm staying in a college hostel environment of hostel is too good & the friends I made here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: I am from Electronics and Telecommunication branch of Keystone School of Engineering. Nearly 30% of students from our department were placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and Infosys. 90% of the students are granted internships at Tech Mahindra and Zensar. Placed students are offered roles like telecom engineer and junior electronic engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There are two buildings, one is for first-year students and the other one is for second, third, and fourth-year students. There are various labs for respective courses, a common library present for all students, Wi-Fi is also available throughout the college. The hostel is somewhat not satisfactory as the raviolis did not feel upto the mark. The quality of food is average. There are no medical facilities. There are many sports such as volleyball, football, cricket, table tennis, carrom, chess, and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Keystone - a memorable experience.

content.Placements: 90% of students were placed in our previous batch, and they had a great experience. There is a fixed bond between companies and the college, as said by the placement incharge. They did up to 3-4 internships, online, offline, and some even hybrid. Top roles offered can be a developer or senior developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very great, and the building is new. All classrooms have Wi-Fi and internet, and all laboratories are well developed with the latest equipment. The library has books, but not for the 2019 syllabus. Reference books are present, and the staff is very cooperative.

There is a clean kitchen and our sports room has sports equipment like cricket, football, volleyball, chess and many more things.

reviews.review_heading: Computer Science Engineering from the Keystone Engineering College, Pune.
reviews.review_text: This college has an above average infrastructure for our course. It offers all the modern facilities to the students for upliftment of their learnings. Wi-Fi, labs, library, computers, canteen, sports, medical, halls, auditoriums etc. were available in the campus. The college has its own hostel for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Nice infrastructure, helpful teachers and amazing events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good of our college, department. The labs are very big and clean, also the classrooms are nice and the library management is also very nice. The Wi-Fi facility is provided by the college. The quality of hostel I don't know because I live in my home but my friends live in the hostel so that is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: They can't even keep documents safe; many of us lost documents because we misplaced them. Wi-Fi is not good; mobile networks don't work properly; electricity keeps fluctuating; and classrooms are damaged by water droplets from the ceiling. The library does not have the latest books, the new syllabus books for teaching. Publication is still not available; labs do not have any purchase software; all of this is a crack version, and many of the systems are not working. Recently, new systems were ins...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements, facilities, and faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is spread over 11 acres of land. The playground is spread over 2 acres of land. There are 4 computer laboratories in this college. They have more than 300 computers with approved licenses. All laboratories are well-equipped. The mechanical laboratory is very good. Hostels are decent. Mess is available. Medical facilities are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like good classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, a huge library with a large number of books to read, a huge playground to support outdoor activities, a cafeteria, and a large auditorium for events. The hostel is average. The food served in the canteen and mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good for computer and electronics engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for our course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are good. The college is in a rural area.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Laboratories are good. Almost 100 computers are available in the library, and several books are available. Hostel facilities are good. Mess and canteen facilities are available. Sports and games are available. It also provides a huge digital library. Sports ground is huge, with a cricket ground. The library is big, and almost 500 students can sit at a time and study peacefully. Sports are conducted every two months.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Keystone School of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Campus life is excellent. Soon after the re-opening of college, there will be a fresher's party and traditional day. The library is huge, where almost 500+ students can sit and study books. Events are conducted every two months. We have clubs like NCC, street cause and NSS run by our student union.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and has good infrastructure and the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have a good infrastructure, but we have different labs for different subjects. We have a small library, and Wi-Fi is also available. The hostel facility is good here, and we have free Wi-Fi, TV and indoor games to play. Food is not provided in the hostel, so we have to make our own arrangements.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Yenepoya Institute of Technology is mainly concerned with the Engineering and Technology streams. The college offers a BTech programme to students for a duration of 4 years. YIT Mangalore courses are AICTE-approved and are offered to students in full-time mode. Further, Yenepoya Institute of Technology offers a BTech programme across several specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, among others. The following table showcases a list of Yenepoya Institute of Technology Mangalore courses along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Yenepoya Institute of Technology BTech eligibility requries students to complete Class 12 or equivalent with PCM and a minimum aggregate of around 50%. The aggregate may vary depending on various factors. Students also need to provide scores secured in exams such as KCET and COMEDK UGET to be eligible for admission. For more details, candidates can reach out to the admission desk of the institute by filling out the enquiry form or via call.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Yenepoya Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Yenepoya Institute of Technology accepts several entrance exams. The institute considers valid score secured in the relevant exam to shortlist the candidates. Students can provide either KCET or COMEDK scores at the time of admission. Candidates may need to register and appear for the counselling process conducted by the concerned authority and submit the college code to get a seat at the desired programme.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Yenepoya Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Yenepoya Institute of Technology admits candidates based on academic merit + entrance exam scores. Class 12 marks are merely one of the required criteria. To be eligible for admission, students must also provide a valid score secured in the accepted test. Hence, no, Class 12 marks are certainly not enough to get into Yenepoya Institute of Technology. However, for more details, you can visit the official website of the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering with IBM - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for study not for playing.

review_content.Placements: The placement is less this year and low package. The highest package is 9 Lacs. 90% of students get placement in college. The minimum package is 1lpa. The package was said in annually. The college has a placement cell and a separate facility for the placement coordinator. They give training placement for 1 year itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The College was small you could see it in 5 minutes. The library is good and big, Wi-Fi was not in the hostel, the good classrooms, good labs. The Facilities of the hostel are good and less hostel fee food but the food in the mess is not tested. The Canteen food is good, one free medical checkup is done by the college. There are so many hospitals near the college. Our college give important to sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering with TCS iON - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very good in this college. Placements depend on your skills and basic knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Separate laboratories are available for each branch. Classrooms are decent. Several books are available in the library.
review_content.Faculty: It is a little difficult, but we can catch up with our studies. Three internal exams are conducted in this college. Two assignments are conducted in this college. Faculty members are good. The teaching quality is better for us to understand every topic easily.

Yenepoya Institute of Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
faqs.question: Q: What specialisation does Yenepoya Institute of Technology offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Yenepoya Institute of Technology are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Yenepoya Institute of Technology has a rating of 3.2 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3, 3.3, 3.2 and 3.1 as per reviews by students.
faqs.question: Q: Is Yenepoya Institute of Technology worth considering?

faqs.answer: Yenepoya Institute of Technology offers a limited number of seats for its courses, admission to which is made on an entrance basis. Hence, the competition is relatively high. However, with the right preparation and strategy, even average students can certainly get into the institute. Candidates must have secured a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board in Class 12 with the relevant subjects. Additionally, students need to submit valid scores secured in the relevant exam.

faqs.answer: Yes, admission is open at Yenepoya Institute of Technology. Students interested in joining the institute can apply for the desired course/ specialisation by meeting the admission criteria and filling out the application form prescribed by the institute. For any questions regarding the admission process, criteria, or any another the latest update, students can visit the official website of the institute.

review_summary.college_name: Yenepoya Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering with IBM - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The management was very bad, and lots of fine was collected.

content.Placements: The worst placements, not even a single IT company came, and when we asked the reason, it was said as the recession. My class had a 98% result but 0% in placement. But the fees were collected prior to that. IT students with good grades are now unemployed. The management was worse.
content.Infrastructure: Nothing was valuable, all a waste of time and money. Nothing valuable was taught, nor were any events done, even though a farewell wasn't given. But fees were collected before their time. For each silly thing, a fine was collected from students. No events, nothing.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering with IBM - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges for those searching for good academics with less fees.

content.Placements: Placements are increasing yearly. Many good companies visit here like TCS, INFOSYS, Intellipat, etc. Everybody is getting good packages. Three to four lakh per annum packages are offered. Students with good skills can earn more, so you need to develop your skills.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is okay from fees point of view. Now new labs are being constructed. Hostel facilities are good for the fees. There are three, two, and four sharing rooms. You can select according to your wish. Fees will vary according to it. Food is good and improving.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for studies and sports.

content.Placements: Placements are very good. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. admission_overview.college_name: Yenepoya Institute of Technology Admission 2026: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Yenepoya Institute of Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Yenepoya Institute of Technology admission is primarily entrance-based. The institute offers an undergraduate degree in the fields of Engineering and Technology. Students are admitted based on their performance in the relevant entrance exams. Yenepoya Institute of Technology also known as YIT, offers its flagship BTech programme across multiple specialisations, such as Mechnaincal Engineering, Electronics and Communications, Computer Science & Technology, and more. The application process generally commences online. Students can read the following article to learn all about the admission criteria and process of the institute.

eligibility_selection.title: Yenepoya Institute of Technology Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Yenepoya Institute of Technology course admission is made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students seeking to enrol into the institute need to not only meet the basic eligibility, but, secure a good rank in the entrance exams accepted by the institute. As the institute offers programmes at the undergraduate level only, passing Class 12 is the minimum qualification. The institute offers its B.E/ BTech courses via various departments. Students interested in joining any of the YIT courses, can check out the following table to learn about the general eligibility & selection criteria for the same:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with relevant subjects from a recognised board

faqs.answer: Yenepoya Institute of Technology accepts several entrance exams. The institute considers valid score secured in the relevant exam to shortlist the candidates. Students can provide either KCET or COMEDK scores at the time of admission. Candidates may need to register and appear for the counselling process conducted by the concerned authority and submit the college code to get a seat at the desired programme.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by Yenepoya Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for Yenepoya Institute of Technology requires students to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. The institute accepts candidates based on their academic performance and entrance exam scores. Hence, aspirants must have studied Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and secured a good minimum aggregate. Final selection is mainly done based on KCET/ COMEDK scores.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Yenepoya Institute of Technology admission?

admission_process.title: Yenepoya Institute of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheYenepoya Institute of Technology admission processinvolves application, appearing for entrance exam, participating in counselling (if required), followed by document verification and seat confirmation. The procedure mainly commences online. Students can follow the step-by-stepYIT admission processexplained below:
Check the Eligibility

Before applying for the courses offered at the institute, it is really important that students go through the admission criteria for the same. A general admission criteria is mentioned in theYenepoya Institute of Technology eligibility and selection criteriasection above.
Appear for Entrance Exam

As admissions are primarily entrance-based, students need to appear for the concerned entrance examination. The institute mainly accepts KCET and COMEDK scores to shortlist candidates for its engineering courses.
Shortlisting and Document Verification

Candidates who make it to the final merit list/ get shortlisted need to go through counselling if they’re applying via counselling. Those applying under the management quota can do the needful as prescribed by the institute. Students need to go through document verification before final offer is made.
Seat Confirmation
To secure a seat, candidates need to payYenepoya Institute of Technology feesas prescribed by the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Yenepoya Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yenepoya Institute of Technology BTech eligibilityrequries students to complete Class 12 or equivalent with PCM and a minimum aggregate of around 50%. The aggregate may vary depending on various factors. Students also need to provide scores secured in exams such as KCET and COMEDK UGET to be eligible for admission. For more details, candidates can reach out to the admission desk of the institute by filling out the enquiry form or via call.

faqs.question: What are the BTech courses offered at Yenepoya Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yenepoya Institute of Technology offers a wide range of BTech courses. The admission criteria is generally same across all of the offered specialisations. Students can visit institute's official website to start the process of admission. YIT Mangalore offers these programmes via its departments. Check out the list below to know about Yenepoya Institute of Technology BTech courses:Mechanical EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringComputer Science & EngineeringElectrical & Electronics E

faqs.question: Can an average student get into Yenepoya Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yenepoya Institute of Technology offers a limited number of seats for its courses, admission to which is made on an entrance basis. Hence, the competition is relatively high. However, with the right preparation and strategy, even average students can certainly get into the institute. Candidates must have secured a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board in Class 12 with the relevant subjects. Additionally, students need to submit valid scores secured in the relevant exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Yenepoya Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Yenepoya Institute of Technology, students need to complete a set of steps. These steps include application, selection, counselling, document verification, and admission confirmation. Students can either apply via the KCET and COMEDK codes or through the management quota. The form for the same can be found on the official website of the institute. Applicants are then selected based on their academic performance and entrance exam scores. For final admission confirmation, students need to pay the admission fees as per the institute's guidelines.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for study not for playing.
reviews.review_text:
The College was small you could see it in 5 minutes. The library is good and big, Wi-Fi was not in the hostel, the good classrooms, good labs.
The Facilities of the hostel are good and less hostel fee food but the food in the mess is not tested. The Canteen food is good, one free medical checkup is done by the college. There are so many hospitals near the college. Our college give important to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Separate laboratories are available for each branch. Classrooms are decent. Several books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for studies and sports.
reviews.review_text: In our department, many laboratories are available such as analog & digital electronics laboratory, VLSI laboratory, electrical circuits laboratory, etc. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the speed is 10 Mbps. Classrooms are well-maintained. The library is decent. Food is suitable for both Kerala and Karnataka students. A playground is available for sports like football. There is a table tennis court in this college. Indoor games like table tennis and chess are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Preferable for those who need to study and complete course. You don't get college life in here.
reviews.review_text: The college provides you good classes and labs. Only in college you can get wi-fi, there is no Wi-Fi in hostels. Library is also nice. They provide you hostel inside the campus. They provide you with food also but it's not good. Medical facilities are there. College conduct football, cricket etc. leagues.

reviews.review_heading: Don't expect any college life from this college.
reviews.review_text: If we compare YIT with other colleges the infrastructures of this college is very pitty. Canteen is also not great. But it is value for money. Food in the hostel is also not great. Most of the days the food is bad. You get good food from the canteen if you pay for it extra.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good education and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a good infrastructure for the girls' hostel, which had attached bathrooms and looked luxurious but the boys' hostel looked more like a public room with public bathrooms. Cots were old and not so good, and they made a lot of sounds. Bathrooms were not so clean on some floors.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college and I am happy that I graduated from YIT.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent buildings and a nice environment, which makes it a good place to study. The lab environment is also good. The faculty members are supportive. The lab assistant is also free, supportive, and helpful. The library is good. There is no need to buy a textbook, you can get it from the library and faculty members also provide notes.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but bad college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. It has a very up-to-date IT lab, chemistry lab, physics lab, etc. For mechanical students, there is a separate mechanical block. Classrooms are fitted with e-boards and the classrooms are pretty good. College has a good library.

reviews.review_heading: As I felt this college is good but without college bus it's hard to travel to the college campus .
reviews.review_text: CSE department is actually very nice it? S amazing. And classrooms is not that good we pay so much and it? S not worthy library is nice. Hostel facilities but in girl hostel to canteen people should walk so much it? S difficult to go up and down everyday 3times canteen food is also that good it is kind of okay. Sports and games is amazing .

reviews.review_heading: My academic review of Yenepoya Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure provided by Yenepoya Institute Of Technology is excellent they provide advanced teaching methods and technology. Labs are well-advanced and 24-hour Wi-Fi connections in labs are available but in classrooms, phones are not allowed as well as in library but laptops can be used in library. Hostel provided by Yenepoya Institute Of Technology is average most of the time there is a network problem and Wi-Fi is also not available but in the case of food, it is good and hygienic. They als...

reviews.review_heading:
Actually I thought it is very bad college and interior 
.
reviews.review_text: Very good lab facility hostel facility Wi-Fi facilities good food hostel rooms are top notch and washrooms ade very clean very clean kitchen and cooking department there are separate mess facilities for girls and boys totally very good infrastructure for girls and boys also providing laundry.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, but not recommended.
reviews.review_text: They provide hostel facilities for distant students. The hostel facilities are not that much good. Hostel food is very bad compared to other Yenepoya colleges. No Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel, but in college, there is Wi-Fi but not for students. College infrastructure is not that much great but can be adjusted. Lab facilities are good in this college. Ground is available for sports and activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college provides a calm atmosphere for students to relax and prepare for their studies. Our classrooms have an optimal learning environment. They allow students to listen and learn from their classes. Our college provides free laptops and Wi-Fi for students. Each department has different labs for specific research activities and a two-floor library. It is available from 9 am - 9 pm. The hostel provides af...

Step 2: From the drop-down menu, select "Benefit".
Step 3: On the redirected webpage, you will find a list of scholarship schemes offered by the institute along with the application link for the same.
Step 4: Click on the application link of the desired scheme.

faqs.answer: Government Engineering College, Kozhikode has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have minimum 60% marks (54% for SEBC (OBC) in B.Tech. or B.E. in Chemical Engineering, Bio Chemical Engineering, Bio Technology, Bio Technology & Bio Chemical Engineering, Polymer and Rubber Technology, Polymer Engineering, Fire and Safety Engineering, Petroleum Engineering Instrumentation/ Instrumentation and Control/Applied Electronics & Instrumentation/ Electronics& Instrumentation/ BioMedical/ Electronics & Bio Medical/ Bio Medical Instrumentation Eng. For SC/ST candidates a pass in the Engineering Degree course is sufficient. Candidates, who have passed AMIE / AMIETE Examinations and satisfying the following conditions, are eligible for admission. 1) They must have valid GATE score. 2) A minimum of 55% marks for section B in AMIE/AMIETE examination. Candidates who have appeared for the final semester examination can also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 17 years of age as on the 31st December 2023.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Engineering College, Kozhikode a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Government Engineering College, Kozhikode is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Government Engineering College, Kozhikode has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Kozhikode Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college and social life.

content.Placements: Many companies come to hire and many students get placed in good companies. About 40 Percent got placed. Almost all students went for internships in good companies and many went for further studies or to seek a job abroad. KMML and other companies hire every year.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided are very good with good lab facilities, classrooms and libraries etc. We do not have a mens hostel and space for extra curricular activities is limited. We have got many hostels nearby within walking distance to college at affordable prices and with good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Needs improvement in infrastructure at GECK.

content.Placements: About 90% of students in our batch get placement in different companies. But some of them only get good packages, and the majority of students get low packages. The top recruiting company is Larsen and Toubro. About 25% of students get opportunities in good companies, while others are offered very low packages.
content.Infrastructure: A well-facilitated campus is provided with a large library, labs, and good academic support. But physically, the college is limited because it is situated in the center of Kozhikode city. Therefore, less space is allotted, and we do not have proper facilities like a playground or a college basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Government Engineering College, Kozhikode (GEC Kozhikode) is one of the premier engineering colleges
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure, but it is not an excellent college that provides all basic facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, canteens, etc., and also clubs like IEEE and NSS. The college only provides a hostel for girls. There is no boys' hostel. The college is overall good, but the size is very small compared to other engineering colleges. The college is located in an urban area.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but lacks area.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good hostel facility for girls, but lacks a hostel facility for boys. Boys stay either as paying guests or in some private hostel. Hostel rent varies from 5k to 6k. Labs are well equipped. The college lacks a playground of its own, and we use Polytechnic colleges ground. Good canteen and its also budget friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Important facts about GECK.
reviews.review_text: A good government hostel facility is available for girls. But no government hostel facility for boys. Usually, boys stay as paying guests or in some other private hostels. Well-equipped labs are available. The college lacks a playground of its own. We use the same playground as the nearest Polytechnic college.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure, with reliable campus WiFi.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure with reliable campus WiFi wellequipped labs and a comprehensive library that includes digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent providing hygienic food and basic medical care. Students also have access to various sports facilities which helps them balance their academics with physical activities. College has good infrastructure with reliable campus WiFi and wellequipped labs that feature the latest technology for practical learning. The comprehensive li...

reviews.review_heading: Overall good performance.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not provided by the college, but lots of options in the surroundings with good food and facilities provided. We get Wi-Fi, good hotels, and homely food, but the girls' hostel is provided by the college, that is limited occupancy. There is a lot of greenery and nature around.

reviews.review_heading: College is small but located in the center of city, with nice infrastructure and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is excellent. Currently, only a girls' hostel is available. It provides Wi-Fi facility and three meals a day at an affordable price. The environment is good for studying. The hostel admission is based on KEAM score, distance, and reservation. Many PGs and private hostels are also available. Wardens are strict.

college_info.college_name: Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 18,000 to 2,66,784.

faqs.answer: A:    Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for After 10th Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialization at Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology are Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Sales & Marketing.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology has courses such as B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, MBA/PGDM specializations in Sales & Marketing.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer:
A:    Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidates completed Bachelor of Engineering degree with Computer Engineering/Electrical Engineering/Electronics Engineering/Electronics and TeleCommunication Engineering/Instrumentation Engineering/Information Technology/Power Electronics from Mumbai University or any recognized institute/university are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates completed graduation/bachelor's degree recognized by Association of Indian University, New Delhi are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students get placed in the course. Around 50 to 60 percent of students get placed. Companies like Qspider and Hexaware visit the college for placements. The highest package offered is 6 LPA. The average package offered is 3.5 LPA. Roles like web developers and system engineers are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good with impressive facilities and modern buildings. Classrooms are well-equipped with the latest technology including smart boards and high-speed internet. Mess food is surprisingly good here. Hygiene is strictly adhered to. The kitchen staff members are diligent in maintaining cleanliness.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: A good college to learn and improve yourself.

review_content.Placements: The total percentage of students that were offered placement was 40% as per the criteria and eligibility and the interview. The highest average package was 7 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA. Reliance, Capgemini, Tata were the top recruiters. Front-end developer was one of the top roles. 30% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities that are available in the college were a good and hygienic canteen, computer labs, mechanical labs, electrical labs, library, good campus, playground, bus facility, and good staff. The quality of the food that was served was also good. The college provided Wi-Fi facility in the library as it gave access to various learning sites that helped many students to clear examinations.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply.M.E./M.Te
