hostel_campus.college_name: Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average placement assistance and well-qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have Wi-Fi connections, computer labs, a large library, a canteen, an auditorium, classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, bad placements, average infrastructure, and no hostel.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi availability is clear. Labs are also available. Classrooms are good. A library is there. We have a canteen. Many more facilities are available in the college. No hostel is available here. Travelling is an issue for students.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good with impressive facilities and modern buildings. Classrooms are well-equipped with the latest technology including smart boards and high-speed internet. Mess food is surprisingly good here. Hygiene is strictly adhered to. The kitchen staff members are diligent in maintaining cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to learn and improve yourself.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that are available in the college were a good and hygienic canteen, computer labs, mechanical labs, electrical labs, library, good campus, playground, bus facility, and good staff. The quality of the food that was served was also good. The college provided Wi-Fi facility in the library as it gave access to various learning sites that helped many students to clear examinations.

reviews.review_heading: It has lots of good as well as bad experiences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but there is no hostel in the college, so you have to take a PG for living. The college has a big campus, and also, the workshop is good for mechanical and civil students. The college also has a good mess for the students. The college is approximately 4 floors high and have tons of experience.

reviews.review_heading: The college area is silent and connected with the river.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the canteen provides food at a low price. The Wi-Fi has the best speed and is easily available for everyone. All classrooms have projectors and are well-maintained. The computer and other labs are the best and well-maintained. The college provides computers for Valorant, Call of Duty inter-college matches, and high-speed Wi-Fi for them.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money engineering college in Thane.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are average. There are many classrooms and labs, and most of the labs have internet access and LAN is available. The computer centers are working properly and are a good resource for students to practice and do practical work. However, the on-campus canteen is not good, and medical facilities are lacking.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alamuri Ratnamala Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure was good and there we students had proper labs and also each classroom has AC and Smart boards.
Hostels were like an apartment; each room was a 1-bedroom flat, with every room having 4 students and mess food that was tasteful and the owner of the mess was quite a friendly person.

reviews.review_heading: Just a below average college .
reviews.review_text: There is a library in our college and we also have a reading room in our college. There is also a canteen in our college. We also get Wi-Fi on our whole college campus but the speed of the internet is very slow and other facilities are also not very well maintained. The college doesn't have hostel so don't be dependent on the college for the hostel facility .

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely recommending this college if you are interested in Diploma of engineering.
reviews.review_text: All-over facilities are good for, eg. canteen has good and hygiene food, campus was big enough, and there is greenery beside the college I chose this college because of the scenario. There are different classes and sections for different branches. All branches has separate lab. In this college, there is huge library.

reviews.review_heading: All good, but have transport issues.
reviews.review_text: Outer appearance of the college is faint. But the condition of the classrooms is good; each classroom has projectors and a digital board. Wi-Fi is available in the whole college. There is a nice library. The quality of the canteen is very nice, and a conditioned gym is also there.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching here is terrible, we are not given practical sessions or lectures of complete syllabus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only available for computers; you can access it. They have computers in the lab in very bad condition; some are not working properly. The classroom is average, and the library is good. They don't have a hostel in college. But the canteen has good food. They have a few sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with a low fee for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are huge. All benches are in good condition. Each classroom has a projector. The library is good. It has a reading room. The food served in the canteen is delicious and hygienic. Our college has a basketball ground. It has a net arrangement for volleyball and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge for sports. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. A canteen provides hygienic food. The medical facility is available. Labs are available for all subjects. There is a hostel close to the college that is very clean and disciplined.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The mess is good, and the food is very tasty. Food Street is available in front of the college campus.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

individual_reviews.title: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.

The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

cut_off.college_name: Government College of Engineering, Chandrapur Cutoff 2025: Check MHT CET MTech Round Wise Cutoff Percentiles

description: Government College of Engineering, Chandrapur MHT CET Cutoff 2025 has been announced for B.Tech admission covering all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI or the HS quota. For other exams, the cutoff data can be viewed in the exam-wise sections. More updates are below:

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Government College of Engineering, Chandrapur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 36.52 and 89.99, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 89.99. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 36.52, Ins

Government College of Engineering, Chandrapur MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 89.99. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 86.18 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Government College of Engineering, Chandrapur for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

Before finalising any institute, a candidate should compare different colleges with each other to know which one suits them the best. Students can use the filters below to compare different colleges that accept MHT CET percentile for admission to B.E. / B.Tech course.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering Design, followed by M.Tech. in Electrical Power System, with the cutoff being 17.67 and 8.33, respectively.
See the table below for more such comparisons about other categories in different rounds and years.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good. A number of departments are present, and their facilities are excellent. Classrooms are clean and under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements from last year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good, but Wi-Fi is available in all departments and the library. Students can use the college library till 9 PM for their studies. The hostel is nice compared to other government colleges. The mess is not provided by the college. We need to pay for it separately.

reviews.review_heading: The college has experienced faculty and a decent college life.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the required facilities like Wi-Fi and a hostel. It mainly provides 6 branches. Based on my experience, the core branches have an upper hand in this college. The college has Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Instrumentation, and Civil branches.

reviews.review_heading: The college has poor infrastructure development. It doesn't have a proper road and old building.
reviews.review_text: We had a departmental library in our department building, which provides all the data that is required of us. Each room has a Wi-Fi facility and has a projector place inside. Hostel rooms are very good; each room can consist of 2 students, and all-year students can live in a hostel with a capacity of 200 students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for middle-class students .
reviews.review_text: There is no WiFi in college. The library is good. Teachers are very good. The hostel needs to be renovated. And the playground is good; it's a huge one. We can play 3 to 4 sports at a time. The environment is good, surrounded by numerous plants.

reviews.review_heading: From the study point of view and the feeling point of view, this college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big library that provides all types of books related to curriculum and competitive exams. The college has its own hostel, which has a capacity of about 250 students. The college provides a 24-hour Wi-Fi facility to the students. The college also conducts all types of sports with the required equipment.

reviews.review_heading: College is improving in placement in last 2 years and will make good career impact on students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good (new construction is going on), but the environment and surrounding can give you comfort. There is availability of Wi-Fi in all departments. Better with the library, there are over 20,000 books available. Canteen quality is nice.

reviews.review_heading: No placement but the hostel is good .
reviews.review_text:
The library is not that good but okay, we can say.
Classrooms are not bad, and the lab is also in okay condition.
The hostel is too good; we can stay in 1 room with 2 people, with 2 study tables, 2 beds and a separate locker.
The water cooler and theater are there. In short, hostels are good 
Gym facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: For Taking only degree not placement then take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good one main big buliding and for all branches have different buildings college has auditorium college have Wi-Fi campus only for professors not for students Wi-Fi available there is canteen in college Computer Science and instrumentation engineering have same building.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good environment. Every department building has a big playground for cricket. Hostels are available for both girls and boys with a friendly environment and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best teachers, but placements are below average.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. The college has one main building. In the main building, all classes of all branches are available. The departments of civil engineering and electronics and telecommunications are in the main building. Other departments have other buildings. Labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college at affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in the college. Separate buildings are there for each department with a big library in the campus and a big college ground. Separate boys and girls hostels are there. Proper roads for every department are present and laboratories are good. CIIIT labs are well polished and usable.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of low fees and excellent staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average but has excellent facilities. They are constructing more buildings for better facilities. There are average hostels for girls and boys. College has an average library, canteen, and medical facilities. There is a big auditorium in which they organise various events.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and a library are available. The hostel provides the least facilities, and electricity goes off every day for some time, and then turns on after complaining. Food is not provided in the hostel. The medical facilities are also not provided. Sports and games are held but only annually.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: We have the old but attractive infrastructure and there is the availability of a playground and sports department. First aid kit is also available outside every classroom and for the sports department. We also have free Wi-Fi on campus. Many books are available in the college library. The campus is huge and a hostel facility is also available.

college_info.college_name: Trinity Academy of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Trinity Academy of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Trinity Academy of Engineering offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Trinity Academy of Engineering offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MCA. Trinity Academy of Engineering fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,40,870 to 3,32,176.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Kind. Satisfied because of college and dissatisfied about the location of the college.

review_content.Placements: Companies visit college, but the main thing is they don't get satisfied due to some students. So work on your skills, don't get dependent on college. Seniors guide you about placement when you get admitted into college. Even they help you with upgrading your skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, even the hostel is also good, but I will not recommend this college to day scholars because there is a lack of buses while coming home. While coming home, there are no buses because of the location of the college. But if the number of buses increases, then I recommend this college to day scholars also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of my two years experience in this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not good. Sales and tech support roles were offered nost of the IT students. Some companies came for IT and hired around 10 students for job roles with salary packages of 3 LPA-4 LPA. Most students get trained through third-party classes such as QSpiders and PentagonSpace.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus has Wi-Fi facilities with good speed, but it slows down before 5:00 PM. Library is quite good and includes a 24/7 study hall. Hostel life is pretty awesome, and students enjoy their time in classes. Overall, the experience is good.

review_summary.college_name: Trinity Academy of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great college.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed, and the package is on an average of 6 LPA to 8 LPA. The placement officer is also so great and helps the students to give their best, and helps them by providing what the company can ask about, and gives a little bit of knowledge about the company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and the food quality of the canteen is very good. Wi-Fi in college is great and we can use it in any area of campus. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is silent and sports games are also available at the college. CCTV is available in every classroom.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A closer look at Trinity Academy of Engineering Pune's placement record.

content.Placements: Trinity Academy of Engineering Pune achieves about 70 percent of placements annually. Companies offer salary packages ranging from 1 LPA to 6 LPA. This college focuses on skill development, ensuring students are industry-ready, with many placed in IT, core engineering, and service sectors.
content.Faculty: Faculty members at Trinity Academy of Engineering, Pune are highly qualified, with many holding advanced degrees. They are dedicated to students' growth through practical learning, mentoring, and research guidance. Regular workshops and seminars enhance teaching effectiveness. Semester exams at Trinity Academy of Engineering, Pune are moderately challenging. Success depends on consistent study, understanding of concepts, and practical application. Regular attendance, internal assessment, and faculty guidance ease preparation, making exams manageable.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Kind. Satisfied because of college and dissatisfied about the location of the college.

content.Placements: Companies visit college, but the main thing is they don't get satisfied due to some students. So work on your skills, don't get dependent on college. Seniors guide you about placement when you get admitted into college. Even they help you with upgrading your skills.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, even the hostel is also good, but I will not recommend this college to day scholars because there is a lack of buses while coming home. While coming home, there are no buses because of the location of the college. But if the number of buses increases, then I recommend this college to day scholars also.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my two years experience in this college.

content.Placements: Placements were not good. Sales and tech support roles were offered nost of the IT students. Some companies came for IT and hired around 10 students for job roles with salary packages of 3 LPA-4 LPA. Most students get trained through third-party classes such as QSpiders and PentagonSpace.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has Wi-Fi facilities with good speed, but it slows down before 5:00 PM. Library is quite good and includes a 24/7 study hall. Hostel life is pretty awesome, and students enjoy their time in classes. Overall, the experience is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: An average college with decent placements and faculty for the computer Science.

content.Placements: At the Trinity Academy of Engineering, 30-40% of the students get placed in our course. Some of the local companies visit our college for placements. The average package offered at this college was between INR 3-5 LPA. The top roles offered in this course were software developers, web developers etc.
content.Infrastructure: For our course, this college has an average infrastructure. It has computer labs with Wi-Fi facility for programming. Library of the college was well stocked. Canteen food was good and offered at reasonable price. Hostel facility was also available for the students. Various Sports activities were organized in this college.

description: Trinity Academy of Engineering Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Trinity Academy of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 161959 and 342118 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 161959, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 171498.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 161959.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.

hostel_campus.college_name: Trinity Academy of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Great college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and the food quality of the canteen is very good. Wi-Fi in college is great and we can use it in any area of campus. Classrooms are neat and clean. The library is silent and sports games are also available at the college. CCTV is available in every classroom.

reviews.review_heading: A closer look at Trinity Academy of Engineering Pune's placement record.
reviews.review_text: Trinity Academy of Engineering Pune achieves about 70 percent of placements annually. Companies offer salary packages ranging from 1 LPA to 6 LPA. This college focuses on skill development, ensuring students are industry-ready, with many placed in IT, core engineering, and service sectors.

reviews.review_heading: Kind. Satisfied because of college and dissatisfied about the location of the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, even the hostel is also good, but I will not recommend this college to day scholars because there is a lack of buses while coming home. While coming home, there are no buses because of the location of the college. But if the number of buses increases, then I recommend this college to day scholars also.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my two years experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: Campus has Wi-Fi facilities with good speed, but it slows down before 5:00 PM. Library is quite good and includes a 24/7 study hall. Hostel life is pretty awesome, and students enjoy their time in classes. Overall, the experience is good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college with decent placements and faculty for the computer Science.
reviews.review_text: For our course, this college has an average infrastructure. It has computer labs with Wi-Fi facility for programming. Library of the college was well stocked. Canteen food was good and offered at reasonable price. Hostel facility was also available for the students. Various Sports activities were organized in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good.
reviews.review_text: Mess is not included in the hostel fees. Except this, all the facilities are available. A lift is also available. The boys and girls hostels are combined, i.e. girls' is on lower floors and boys' is on upper floor. Hostel has 9 floors in total. There is a private mess available in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college, with good academics, and sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is excellent with washing machines, hot water, a water cooler, a filter and huge rooms are given. The hostel is neat and clean. As it is near to college everyone can suggest you live in a hostel. 24/7 Wi-Fi is also there. These facilities are given.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with faculty, average placements, really good campus and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Overall good infrastructure, they take us for industrial visits and help us getting better practical knowledge, there are various labs for different subjects, well maintained classrooms, they have also given us a dedicated sports period to play our desired sport.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to achieve success.
reviews.review_text: Various labs are operated in our department like a mechanical lab,  a physics lab, a chemistry lab, a civil construction lab, etc. They are well maintained. The campus and hostels are well-maintained. There are around 9-10 canteens on campus. The mess facility is available for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: My college review for the Fresher's.
reviews.review_text: In my department block, the best facilities are available such as Wi-Fi, Labs, classrooms, and a library. I have yet to get any more information about the hostel. In my college mess, the food quality is excellent and the best, like homemade food, and they also have a facility for First aid medical. A significant sports ground and an indoor games block are available.

reviews.review_heading: Totally learning and enjoyable.
reviews.review_text: Fully free Wi-Fi zone, Classrooms and labs are conducted very precisely. Hostel and mess facilities are also above average. Library is also available everyday for students to study. Sports and games are also conducted at the college ground compulsory along with studies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Trinity Academy of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus, and there is a big 10-floor building for hostel. Each floor contains 40 rooms, and 3 students in each room. There is one special big room for studying in the hostel which is 24/7 available. There are 4 mess facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good here, and there is value for money. Our campus area is nearly 110 acres of land. The entire campus is surrounded by greenery. The infrastructure of our college is also good, and all labs are well equipped. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is best. The food served is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college, staffs are entertaining, and nature is lovely.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available, and the food facilities were also good in this college. The environment was very nice and entertaining. The gym facility was also available on the campus. sports and games section was also available for students to play, and the playground was very big. I loved our campus, and it was a nice journey.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and provides quality education with value for money.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are equipped with the latest technology of respective fields. Classrooms are spacious and well-furnished with good ventilation. The library has printed as well as digital resources to support the academic progress of the students. The food court provides students with a wide range of healthy and hygienic dietary requirements and is a favourite spot during free hours. There are a lush green sports ground and a well-equipped gym for the fitness enthusiasts...

review_content.General: Infrastructure is the department that my college lacks. There's no Wi-Fi for students, classrooms, or libraries, and the technical provisions are also not in great condition. review_summary.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the top engineering colleges with good placements in Indore.

content.Placements: We have around 60 students in our batch. Around 85% of students get the opportunity for internships in top technology companies. The average package offered to the previous batch was 5.5 LPA, with 12 LPA being the highest package offered and 3.2 LPA being the lowest in the 2024 placement year.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology are as follows, we have Wi-Fi in the whole campus, an Intel lab for the EC department, and digital boards in all classrooms. Our library is equipped with around 30,000 books, and we have a turf and a basketball complex.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great college if you look at the feel, providing a base for your Software Engineering degree.

content.Placements: Approximately 15-20% of students get placed in my course. In my college, last year, the highest package was 6.5 LPA and the lowest was maybe 3 LPA. The average package would be around 3.2 LPA. There's no such company which I can say was the top recruiter. All companies have picked around 3-4 students each. No, there's no internship scheme as such from my college. Web development roles are offered the most.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the department that my college lacks. There's no Wi-Fi for students, classrooms, or libraries, and the technical provisions are also not in great condition. There's no hostel scheme from our college, hence no mess. The canteen is really good, and the sitting and eating area is also great in condition. The medical facility is also top-notch, as Aurobindo Hospital is near. Our college does not have any systematic scheme for sports or games and also no focus on the development of sports personalities, but the college has one cricket turf, one basketball court, and one badminton court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely value for money. Fees are affordable.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed last year. The highest package of the college had been gone to 36 LPA, but the average package is around 5 to 6 LPA. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Tech, Teach for India, Mahindra, etc. The college provides internships in every branch, but one needs to clear it, like the TCS internship programme, Microsoft program, etc. The top roles in my field are AI engineer, data scientist, ml engineer, etc.

Also, there are many digital features like an advanced attendance system. There are 2 to 3 different canteens and food shops around the whole campus which have different kinds of food. Overall, it tastes very good. There are many options for healthy as well as fast food. There are many facilities like sports stars and games.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Last Dates

admission_process.title: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology admission 2025 isopen. The college offers various UG and PG courses, such as BTech, BMTech, MBA, BDes and many more.Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technologyoffers an online mode of application mode. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria set by the college. For final selection, the basic eligibility is to pass the last qualifying exam. The college offersdirect admissionbased on the same. Given below is more information about the Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology admission, along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process 2025:

Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology eligibility varies from course to course. However, a minimum of Class 12 is required to apply for UG courses. Graduation is required to apply for any of the PG courses. Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology's course selection criteria are merit-based. Below areSri Aurobindo Institute of Technology coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology admission process 2025 contains various steps which are required to be followed by the candidates for admission. The candidates looking for admission must fulfil the basic eligibility for admission. Check below for the step-by-stepSri Aurobindo Institute of Technologyadmission process 2025:
Step 1: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Application Process

Candidates looking for admission to various programme at Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology are required to fill out the admission form online. To fill out the application form candidates are required to visit the official website of the college.
Step 2: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to UG and for admission to PG courses, candidates must have a graduation degree. The college offers direct admission to the candidates based on the last exam qualifying score.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: SAIT Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Over the years, the Institute has provided excellent placement opportunities , and students have been placed in senior positions in major companies at domestic and international levels.

During 2024 BTech placements, 62 job offers were made to the 47 students placed . The total number of companies that visited the institute campus for BTech hiring was 67. The highest package bagged by the BTech batch 2024 was INR 12 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 4.70 LPA. In addition to this, the lowest package offered was INR 2.50 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the top engineering colleges with good placements in Indore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology are as follows, we have Wi-Fi in the whole campus, an Intel lab for the EC department, and digital boards in all classrooms. Our library is equipped with around 30,000 books, and we have a turf and a basketball complex.

reviews.review_heading: Great college if you look at the feel, providing a base for your Software Engineering degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the department that my college lacks. There's no Wi-Fi for students, classrooms, or libraries, and the technical provisions are also not in great condition. There's no hostel scheme from our college, hence no mess. The canteen is really good, and the sitting and eating area is also great in condition. The medical facility is also top-notch, as Aurobindo Hospital is near. Our college does not have any systematic scheme for sports or games and also no focus on the development of ...

reviews.review_heading: My point of view about our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college classrooms are good. There are no complaints about the infrastructure because they are the best. Library is very interesting with lots of books. We can study the books related to our course and explore other streams as well. But they use old edition books. Most of the computers are in poor condition in the computer lab, which is very problematic during studies.

reviews.review_heading: An enriching campus experience in academics, community, and beyond.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms, library and labs are well settled in our college. It provides the best environment for students. Hostel facilities are very good, and quality of food is excellent. Medical facilities are also very good. If a studnet feels sick, he/she can have medicine as we have hospital facility and transportation is also available. All the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely value for money. Fees are affordable.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms are quite back and clean. The campus consists of Wi-Fi labs and a huge library which consists of almost every type of book. Also, there are many digital features like an advanced attendance system. 
There are 2 to 3 different canteens and food shops around the whole campus which have different kinds of food. Overall, it tastes very good. There are many options for healthy as well as fast food. There are many facilities like sports stars and games.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good facilities and infrastructure, and the college faculty are also friendly.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in our college; we have smart boards for classes, many desktops to use, and too many labs like chemistry, mechanical, and many more. The infrastructure of our college is also good; it has glass walls. In my hostel, there is a separate room for every student with AC in it, and the quality of food is also good. We get a special meal every Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Totally a value for money college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the campus is good. There is Wi-Fi on the campus on every floor. The college has numerous labs for computer science, civil engineering, and mechanical engineering. One central library is there in the college, which has lots of books in it. There is no hostel facility at the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is worth the fee.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is present throughout the whole campus, and labs are fully equipped with necessary equipment. There is a central library in our college that contains all types of books for studying, and you can also borrow them. Although hostels are not available in my college, it has a cricket turf, a basketball turf, and table tennis facilities. There is also one canteen with the lowest prices on food.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is the best in terms of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All labs and classes are good and air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available for students. The library of our college is very good. Our college provides good learning environment for students. An elevator is available for faculty members and students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Our classrooms are excellent. The hostel facilities are good. Canteens are excellent. Medical facilities are available. Sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. The library is the best. The quality of facilities is very good. Our canteen is very good. The hostel is in very good condition. All classrooms are very good. Wi-Fi is in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements with average salary package of 3 LPA.
reviews.review_text: Cisco labs are available, and many more facilities are also provided. Students can have good knowledge of cyber security. Our college provides good things. They also provide certificates. Students here have good capability of doing everything.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faulty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. The location of the college is not good. Classrooms, labs, and library are great.

reviews.review_heading: College has 95% + students placed with good companies like TCS HCl Infosys .
reviews.review_text:
This college has  good facilities.
We have here two hostel, girls and boys. PG is available. There is a canteen, Wi-Fi and ground.
Labs and library are available.
College library is the best because it has good atmosphere.
This college provide medical facilities,
 games and sports are good .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good and infrastructure is also good in our college. Classrooms are also in good condition and labs in the college are the best. Infrastructure of library is good and you can find all books related to the subject in the library easier for more than 10 days.

paragraphs: Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology awards various scholarships to students as financial assistance. The below-mentioned are the Sri Aurobindo Institute of Technology scholarship details:
tables: Caste certificate with appropriate family annual income certificate
Upto Full Fee Amount (as per the criterions)

Individuals who received 75% or above in class 12th (from the Madhya Pradesh Secondary Education Board) or 85 percent or higher (from the CBSE/ICSE board).From all sources, the family’s annual income must not exceed INR 6 lakh. Engineering candidates must have passed the JEE Mains exams with a score of less than 50,000. Applicants must be registered in a UG programme at a recognised university or institution. Law students are assumed to have passed the CLAT exams and been accepted into an NLU. Medical applicants are anticipated to have received NEET merit admission to a government or private medical or dentistry college.
Upto Full Fee Amount (as per the criterions)
Must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh, and scored a minimum of 60% in class 12th
For specially-abled students, having disability of not less than 40%; family income less than INR 8 LPA;Student admitted to AICTE-Approved Institution;

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities of this college.

review_content.Placements: There is an average of 80 percent of students who get placed after these courses. The highest package is 16 LPA, the average package is 8–9 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies that fall under this university are Indigo, Air India, GMR, and many more. This institution has a 90 percent placement record, and many students, after 2 years of classroom course, get apprenticeships to earn the degree as well as job roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the university are really good, as they provide better facilities and infrastructure for the students while maintaining a healthy environment. Wi-Fi is also allotted to each student for educational purposes. The classrooms and library are good and provided with an advanced technology system, which gives an aesthetic vibe. The mess and canteen food are good and hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: University is overall good. Faculty is also very friendly and approachable.

review_content.Placements: I'm Prakrati Singh of BMS-25. More than 95% of students of this college are placed with a nice package. The lowest stipend is 13,000, and the highest stipend is 26,000. After graduation, packages start from 25,000 onwards. Top recruiting companies are GMR, Indigo, and other logistics and airline companies. More than 95% of students in the course are placed as Logistics Managers and Air Cargo Managers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and infrastructure facilities are awesome. Food is not that good, but the medical facilities are good. Sports and games lobby is also available. There is not much cleanliness, and no canteen is available in the university. No doctor is permanently available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied by the placement provided by the university.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students are placed in the university. Top recruiting companies are Vistara, Air India, Jaipur International Airport, IGI Airport, etc. The highest package offered is 400,000, the lowest is 200,000, and the average is 300,000. Top roles offered in the course are Airport Manager, Cargo Manager, Logistics Manager, Logistics Consultant, Logistics Engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides 24/7 Wi-Fi facilities in the campus as well as the hostel. The classrooms contain 3 ACs, a projector, and cushioned chairs for students. The university has 2 big libraries on the campus. The university has a specialized doctor who sits in the hostel for any emergency. The mess food is also fine, and most of the students like it. The university has its own ground for sports activities such as football, volleyball, cricket, basketball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Airport Operations - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the accommodation facilities, good placements opportunities.

review_content.Placements: 100% is the placement rate here. If you are a good student then you can get good package. Here the average package is 286000. the highest could be 30-45000 depending on your ability. Cargoman, Express roadways, GMR airports and Adani airports, etc. 100%of students get internship for 6months in GMR airports.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities here is too good. Rooms are spacious and food is better than other colleges. You can bet on universities accommodation. review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities of this college.

content.Placements: There is an average of 80 percent of students who get placed after these courses. The highest package is 16 LPA, the average package is 8–9 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies that fall under this university are Indigo, Air India, GMR, and many more. This institution has a 90 percent placement record, and many students, after 2 years of classroom course, get apprenticeships to earn the degree as well as job roles.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the university are really good, as they provide better facilities and infrastructure for the students while maintaining a healthy environment. Wi-Fi is also allotted to each student for educational purposes. The classrooms and library are good and provided with an advanced technology system, which gives an aesthetic vibe. The mess and canteen food are good and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: University is overall good. Faculty is also very friendly and approachable.

content.Placements: I'm Prakrati Singh of BMS-25. More than 95% of students of this college are placed with a nice package. The lowest stipend is 13,000, and the highest stipend is 26,000. After graduation, packages start from 25,000 onwards. Top recruiting companies are GMR, Indigo, and other logistics and airline companies. More than 95% of students in the course are placed as Logistics Managers and Air Cargo Managers.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and infrastructure facilities are awesome. Food is not that good, but the medical facilities are good. Sports and games lobby is also available. There is not much cleanliness, and no canteen is available in the university. No doctor is permanently available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied by the placement provided by the university.

content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students are placed in the university. Top recruiting companies are Vistara, Air India, Jaipur International Airport, IGI Airport, etc. The highest package offered is 400,000, the lowest is 200,000, and the average is 300,000. Top roles offered in the course are Airport Manager, Cargo Manager, Logistics Manager, Logistics Consultant, Logistics Engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides 24/7 Wi-Fi facilities in the campus as well as the hostel. The classrooms contain 3 ACs, a projector, and cushioned chairs for students. The university has 2 big libraries on the campus. The university has a specialized doctor who sits in the hostel for any emergency. The mess food is also fine, and most of the students like it. The university has its own ground for sports activities such as football, volleyball, cricket, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Airport Operations - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the accommodation facilities, good placements opportunities.

content.Placements: 100% is the placement rate here. If you are a good student then you can get good package. Here the average package is 286000. the highest could be 30-45000 depending on your ability. Cargoman, Express roadways, GMR airports and Adani airports, etc. 100%of students get internship for 6months in GMR airports.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities here is too good. Rooms are spacious and food is better than other colleges. You can bet on universities accommodation. University is a bit smaller when compared with others sports facilities are too less, if a student sees their sports career through colleges sports events.

description: Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 265455, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 199133 and 265455 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 199133 and 265455, B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Avionics) were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placement and infrastructure; absolutely fantastic campus and hostel life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are absolutely satisfying, and every department has separate labs, fast Wi-Fi connections, computer labs, and every other necessary lab. Also, the hostel here is not like any other hostel; it's a 10-floor hostel with both girls and boys. The hostel is very good and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent teachers.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very clean. The college has a pleasant atmosphere. The hostel is well maintained. The hostel is near the college, so students can attend the college regularly. Attendance is required for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, and I do not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is huge. Our labs, libraries, classrooms, and Wi-Fi are available. Students are allowed to use labs for study. The college hostel is not good. It's very costly and the fee for food is not included in the hostel fees.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Surroundings of the campus and hostel are not clean. Wi-Fi facility and LAN cable connection are available in our college with good speed.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Pune.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is eco-friendly and full of trees. All the latest books are available in the library. Sports and cultural activities are conducted frequently. A parking facility is also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, faculty, ambience and education quality in our college are amazing.
reviews.review_text: The food is good and affordable, and the quality is good. The kitchen is hygienic, and the taste is like homemade food. Medical facilities are good. The library is well-equipped. Labs are well-equipped and have a hygienic environment.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to learn and get educated.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All the labs are well-equipped and clean. The maintenance of each machinery is regular in the labs. The library has all kinds of reference books available. Also, the food in the canteen is cooked fresh and is available at reasonable rates.

reviews.review_heading: Good but there is no good transport.
reviews.review_text: All facilities was available and infrastructure was good and all things were managed properly even library and labs. All things were good like canteen with well managed staff. It has a capacity of 500 students at that time with well managed non working staffs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment, as it has facilities of mess, providing good and healthy food. Laboratories and testing facilities are available. The living space is also neat, and the food is hygienic. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Our college provides sufficient, and well-maintained facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Our college provides 2 playgrounds, one cricket ground, and 1 football ground. The hostel building is of 10 floors and includes all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of our college is very good. It has a very big campus which provides hostel facility, canteen, grounds, parking, etc. Our college canteen is very hygienic, and all the food available is good and at an affordable price. The nature is very good and peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Sports activities and extra curricular activities are there in the college.
reviews.review_text:
Good classroom environment and highly equipped labs are used for practicals. 
The library consists of many books of various courses and other than courses. 
Sports activities and extra curricular activities are also carried out on various platform.

reviews.review_heading: This college improved me to a huge extent.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure for students, so they can study in a good environment. All the hostel facilities are good for students, and our college has all the necessary infrastructure. Classrooms have good sitting arrangements, and our library is huge and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very specious here, and they are surrounded by nature. So, students enjoy the lectures. The library is also good, and there is any kind of book like technical, non-technical, etc. The hostel is very spacious and has great facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It can provide good campus life and future.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities provided by our college are good. The college currently has a boys hostel. We have ample space for lodging. Each room is occupied by two students only. Security on the campus is tight. Water is provided with a heater, and there is clean drinking water. The food served is not so hygienic. Overall for the price, it is decent.

faqs.answer: To secure a seat at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Candidates must apply online for courses at the official websiteEnsure eligibility and entrance-based selection for UG and PG programs.The selection criteria are entrance-based.Upon selection, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get a seat at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

faqs.answer: Admissions for MBA, BBA, BCA, MCA, and BTech courses at SAGE University powered by Sunstone got started on Jan 1, 2024 and the last date to apply is July 30, 2024. Follow the steps to apply for admission to various courses at Sunstone: SAGE University Indore. The first step is to visit the official website and apply for admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The next step is to appear for the Sunstone Screening round which includes tests and interviews. The next step is to upload various supporting documents for the review of the application. The last step is to accept the SAGE University powered by Sunstone admission offer.
faqs.question: Q: How can students get admission to various courses at SAGE University powered by Sunstone?

faqs.answer: No, candidates who are looking for BBA course admission at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) must pass Sunstone Screening ( Test & Interview). For BBA course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Aspiarnts should pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate (reserved category-45% aggregate). The admission criteria for the course is entrance-based.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to BBA at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

faqs.answer: For admission to BBA course at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are merit-based and candidates must pass Class 12 (common eligibility) minimum 50% aggregate. Aspirants who belong to the ST/SC category should complete graduation with a 45% aggregate. Candidates who have not completed graduation are not eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BBA at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

review_summary.college_name: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Marketing Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and management.

content.Placements: Faculty members are nice and supportive with academics as well as placement and internship guidance. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tata, etc. Internships and placements are based on attendance as well. There is a 100% placement guarantee if our attendance is more than 75% each semester.
content.Infrastructure: Library is above average. Canteen is very small in our department, it's better in Computer Science department. Hostels are average, they have a curfew after 8:00 PM. Food is also average in the canteen, mess food is somewhat better. Infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Recently, students got placed on their good performance. Many companies offered internships and placements to students. The average salary package offered is around 6 LPA. It is good for a fresher. It will be improved in some time and have amazing placement results.
content.Infrastructure: The food is good. The infrastructure is 10/10. Facilities in the hostel are very good. The hostel provides medical support. The hostel is clean and has a good environment. There are amazing students. There is parental support. All facilities are available in hostels.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Marketing Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The academic experience at Sunstone and State University of Indore is decent.

content.Placements: College offers a 100% guaranteed placements. The highest salary package offered is 13 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, KPMG, and Infosys. Around 80% of students from our course secured internships in Infosys, Kotak, and TCS. Top roles offered are Data Analyst, HR, Marketing, Business Manager, Resource Manager, SEO Specialist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Library is decent with relevant books available for each course. Our college has a different building for each course and a separate floor for Sunstone. Quality of food is average. Medical facilities and sports and games are below average. Infrastructure is huge. There are dedicated libraries for each course.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Operations and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Sunstone Eduversity (SAGE) is the best in all attributes.

content.Placements: Sunstone Eduversity has dedicated placement team members who work round the clock to get me and my fellow batchmates placed. The placement system is in such a way that I could attend interviews in companies in which I was interested. Even I got job offers from 2 out of 3 companies. I am thankful to Sunstone for building my career to have success.
content.Infrastructure: SAGE, Indore, has an amazing campus with green surroundings and vast spaces. There is a cafeteria to hang out and spend time relaxing. The campus is well facilitated with labs, a 24x7 library, air-conditioners, hostel, transport and everything which students could need in MBA.

admission_process.title: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) admission 2025is based on entrance exam scores. The university offers BBA, BCA, MBA, etc., courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to theSAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at the SAGE University powered by Sunstone is conducted online. Apart from this, Sunstone now provides aPlacement Accountability Programme.Read the following article to know more about theSAGE University powered by Sunstone course admission2025.

SAGE University powered by Sunstone courses' admissions are based on merit + entrance exam score. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forSAGE University powered by Sunstone courses:
Course Name

Download:SAGE_Indore_2025 Brochure powered by Sunstone

SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation after conducting Sunstone screening (Test and Interview). Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in SAGE University powered by Sunstone:
STEP 1: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedSAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on Sunstone screening (Test and Interview). However, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_report.college_name: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: SAGE University Powered by Sunstone (Indore) Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), trains its students for a variety of job profiles through more than 100 hours of job-focused boot camps. To ensure that the placement-centric sessions are completed successfully, the University's placement team also monitors the dynamic changes occurring globally.

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during SAGE University Powered by Sunstone placements in 2025 stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.6 LPA, respectively. More than 1,200 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided jobs in over 50 domains . The top recruiters of SAGE University Powered by Sunstone (Indore) in 2025 included Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more. In 2025, the ROI was 63% higher.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs. In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program

Quality of food is average. Medical facilities and sports and games are below average. Infrastructure is huge. There are dedicated libraries for each course.

reviews.review_heading: Sunstone Eduversity (SAGE) is the best in all attributes.
reviews.review_text: SAGE, Indore, has an amazing campus with green surroundings and vast spaces. There is a cafeteria to hang out and spend time relaxing. The campus is well facilitated with labs, a 24x7 library, air-conditioners, hostel, transport and everything which students could need in MBA.

paragraphs: The university offers BBA, BCA, MBA, etc., courses at the UG and PG level. SAGE University powered by Sunstone courses' admissions are based on merit + entrance exam score. The application process at the SAGE University powered by Sunstone is conducted online. Students can check course-wise total tuition fees from the table presented below:
Course Name
Total Tuition Fee
BBA
INR 3.3 lakh
MBA
INR 2.7 lakh
BTech (CS)
INR 2.4 lakh-INR 5 lakh
BCA
INR 3 lakh
MCA
INR 1.5 lakh
Note: The numerical data presented in the table above are sourced from official website. Hence, it is indicative.

The total tuition fees of MBA is INR 3 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SAGE University powered by Sunstone offers scholarships to several Meritorious, Sports, and Other category candidates. SAGE University powered by Sunstone provides scholarships to eligible students worth up to INR 10 crore. Prolific sportspeople, Meritorious students, and other achievers can receive up to 100% scholarship for their higher education.

college_info.intro:
Radha Govind University popular programmes are BTech & BCom. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Reliance, Amazon, HDFC Bank, & others. BTech is provided in various specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, & others. BTech students can become Software Engineers, Developers, or can take part in various activities relevant to their field.
Radha Govind University BTech students study various subjects & some of them are circuit theory, microprocessors, electromagnetism, digital electronics, power electronics, & others. The curriculum encompasses both practical applications & theoretical knowledge. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Radha Govind University & their respective eligibility & Radha Govind University fee structure:

admission_process.title: Radha Govind University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Radha Govind University admission 2025is open. AtRadha Govind University, students can pursue courses in various streams such asPharmacy,Science,Management, Law, Library Science,etc. The university offers courses such as BBA, BSc, BCom, MA, MBA, and more at the UG and PG levels. Apart from these, it also offers diploma and doctoral programmes across several subjects. Admissions to RGU Ramgarh are accepted on the basis of both merit and valid scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams.

Radha Govind University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. It also accepts valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams for admissions to its programmes. All of the courses offered atRGU Ramgarhare in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forRadha Govind University admissions:
RGU Ramgarh Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
40 (excluding specialisations)
How to apply
UG courses: INR 10,000 - INR 3.6 lakh
PG courses: INR 18,000 - INR 1.6 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma| PhD
Popular programmes
BA| BSc| BTech| MA| MSc
Download Brochure

Students are accepted into the UG, PG and Diploma programmes offered at RGU Ramgarh on an entrance basis for courses such as MBA, PhD and more. The university also offers admissions on a merit basis for a wide range of its courses. For PhD courses, the university conducts its own entrance exam, however, those with a valid score in other national-level exams are exempted from appearing for the test. Students are offered seats in the programmes offered at RGU Ramgarh on the basis of either academic merit or performance in the entrance exam (whichever is applicable). The below-mentioned table contains information regardingRadha Govind University seat intakefor some of its courses:
Course Name
Seat Intake
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Radha Govind University admissionsare offered based on both entrance and merit secured by applicants in their most recent qualifying exam depending on the programme chosen. For PhD admissions, candidates will have to appear for the PhD Entrance Test conducted by the university. However, if the applicants have appeared in exams such as NET, SLET, JRF, GATE, JET, etc. The eligible candidates can refer to the below-mentioned steps for theadmission process of Radha Govind University:

Step 1: RGU Ramgarh Application Process:Visit the official website of RGU Ramgarh and register yourself. Your application ID and password will be sent to you via email and SMS. Fill out the application process, select the desired programme and proceed with the payment of the application fee to successfully submit the application form.
Step 2: RGU Ramgarh Selection Process

Most of the programmes offered at Radha Govind University accept admissions based on the merit secured by the students in the qualifying exam. For some of its courses, the university accepts students on an entrance basis, for which the applicants must appear for the specified exam. Those who clear the entrance exam will be contacted via mail by the university for further details.
Step 3: Fee Payment and Admission ConfirmationThe shortlisted candidates will be accepted into the programme once they have paid the course fee and submitted the specified documents.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for Radha Govind University admission?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University last dat to apply is  in the third week of June. It is the deadline for normal fees for undergraduate programs such as BTech, BSc, BCom, BA, and BCA.Deadline to avoid late fees: first week of JulyThe second week of June is the deadline for PG programs like MTech, MCA, and MSc with standard fees.The final week of June is when late fees are due.Regarding management and MBA programs:Deadline for normal fees is the second week of May.The fourth week of May is when late fees are due.First week of July is the last day to apply regular fees for law programs such as LLB and LLM.Deadline to avoid late fees: the third week of July.

faqs.question: Does Radha Govind University refund fees?
faqs.answer: A student's complete tuition is refunded by the university, after subtracting the processing fee, if the candidate withdraws his application before the final date of admission.Refunds for admissions are cancelled after the the final date of admission, but if it is cancelled before classes begin 60 - 70%  is refunded.If a student leaves the programme midway through, there is no refund of payment once sessions begin. security deposits can be refunded.If a first-year UG student withdraws their acceptance within one to two months after the beginning of classes, they may be eligible for a 50% return of the fee.

DE Shaw, ICICI, HDFC, EY, and Deloitte have provided the most comprehensive packages. The fields in MBA that pay the highest salaries are mainly finance, analytics, and consulting. So, overall the highest package ranges between INR 13-15 LPA for the top 1-2% of the MBA batch.

average_package.title: Radha Govind University Average Package 2024

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech students at Radha Govind University?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University provides B.Tech students an average package of INR 4-6 LPA (Lakhs per annum). Here are a few more specifics: At RGU, the highest package available to B.Tech students is between INR 18 and 20 LPA. But this is limited to the best students. This typical package covers a variety of fields, including electronics, mechanical, civil, computer science, and IT. Compared to core engineering professions, computer science and associated fields often command somewhat higher average incomes. The typical package offered by FMCG and manufacturing industries is between INR 3.5 and INR 4.5 LPA. The average salary for IT/analytics organizations such as TCS, Infosys, and Wipro is between INR 4-6 LPA.

faqs.question: How much does B.Sc at Radha Govind University cost?
faqs.answer: According to my research, depending on the specialization, obtaining a B.Sc. at Radha Govind University has different costs. The following are the costs for the university's particular B.Sc. programs: Nursing B.Sc .:- The entire cost of tuition for Radha Govind University's B.Sc. in Nursing is INR 3.60 Lakh. B.Sc. in Agricultural Science : The entire cost of tuition is INR 1.60 Lacs for this programme. The tuition and one-time admittance fee are included in the fees shown above.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Radha Govind University expensive?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University charges between Rs 1.5 and Rs 2 Lacs in year MBA tuition. When you consider that the prices for many other private colleges can range from INR 5 to 15 Lacs per year, this seems really reasonable. At RGU, hostel and mess fees range from Rs 80,000 to Rs 1 Lacs per year. Additionally affordable are several hostel possibilities. An additional Rs 10,000–15,000 might be spent a year on books, materials, assignments, and other academic costs. Living expenses in larger cities like Delhi and Mumbai would be higher if taking out an education loan as opposed to smaller ones. A two-year MBA degree at RGU comes with a relatively reasonable total cost of about Rs 4-6 Lakhs. Scholarships are available from Radha Govind University to MBA applicants who demonstrate merit, which helps lower tuition.
