hostel_campus.college_name: Radha Govind University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: If you want only a degree, you will definitely take admission.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the basic facilities like classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi are available, though not at the level of top colleges. Classrooms are spacious but could use more modern equipment. Labs are functional with the necessary instruments and computers, but sometimes lack the latest upgrades. The library has a decent collection of books and study materials, along with a digital section for reference.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the Ramgarh area.
reviews.review_text: The hostel mess and canteen provide the best food for students, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: If you want only a degree this is a good choice but if you want skills you have to look at another.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, a library, and hostels. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is satisfactory. Medical facilities are also available, and there are sports and games offered on campus. The college is green, beautiful, and clean, although the toilets are below average. There is a swimming pool, and buildings are well-maintained, though the college is undergoing further construction.

reviews.review_heading: I want to write this review because I want to share the information about my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are good. Wi-Fi is not so good in our classrooms. But the lab is not so good as per fee structure. Classrooms are good and library is nice. The structure of hostel is the worst. In our college, there is discrimination between boys and girls hostel.

reviews.review_heading: University provides the best quality of infra.
reviews.review_text: Best in infrastructure of college. The library is best, functioning with a silent area. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. I am a hosteler. Classrooms are best and labs are wonderful. All is developing and giving the best quality for students. The total blocks of the university are divided into 8 blocks and it is a big campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best college to complete your graduation.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good, and the labs and classrooms are nice. In my hostel, college Wi-Fi is available. But the quality of food is the worst food I have ever eaten in my life. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Radha govind university Ramgarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are large and comfortable, with blackboards and benches. Labs are present and well-equipped with various lab equipment. The library has many books. Wi-Fi is not available in classes. The hostel is average, with average food. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, and a personal study table is provided. There is no canteen. Sports are only for B.P.Ed. students, but medical help is provided when needed.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine Review of University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, there is a facility for swimming pool and swimming sports competitions are held as well. Wi-Fi is available for all the students. The classrooms are very good. A canteen facility is available, but only for fast food is provided. Sports ground is available for cricket, football, badminton, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Yes I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructural facilities of our college are highly modernized and full of technology. Hostel facility in our college is very good. There was home like environment. Sports, games facilities are also very good. Many students from our college get a chance to represent the college at a national level.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi but only for staff use, classrooms are good, and the library has books regarding professional courses. It does not have books for chemistry honors. They have books for law. The hostel is good, and mess is average. The food is good. For sports only for B.P.Ed students for others on competition and sports day.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructures of course is very well they occupy many space they have swimming pool gym dance classes and much more hostel are not to B.Ed or not to good there are many rooms in the hostel but in one room they have allowed 5 years student at least.

reviews.review_heading: Radha govind University, ramghar. Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. Infrastructure was average. Quality of hostel was average. Boundary of the campus was good. Campus was big. There is a big playground where students can play. I have lots of fabulous memories and good friends and I still miss them.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members, and average infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are good. There is no Wi-Fi available in my department. I did not stay in the hostel. The sports and games facilities are average. Overall, the college infrastructure is basic, and the hostel facilities seem poor based on what I have heard, but I didn't stay there personally.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for only a degree, go for it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and well ventilated. There is a projector board also available. Wi-Fi and internet are also available. Our Computer Science department provides the necessary facilities to support learning and practical exposure. We have well equipped computer labs with internet connectivity for coding and project work, classrooms with projectors for interactive teaching, and access to the central library with computer Science textbooks. The campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, and students mak...
